name: JB Pritzker
subject: Chris Pappas is a proven fighter, folks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Let me cut to the chase.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251112_1_pappas.p16mFE&amount=5&refcode=em20251112-5641&t=1&akid=5641%2E400544%2EZwRnqE)
JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
We can’t let that happen.
Chris Pappas is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks.**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:
**[If you can, please split a $5 donation right now between Chris Pappas and Deb Haaland to put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251112_1_pappas.p16mFE&amount=5&refcode=em20251112-5641&t=2&akid=5641%2E400544%2EZwRnqE)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251112_1_pappas.p16mFE&amount=5&refcode=em20251112-5641&t=21&akid=5641%2E400544%2EZwRnqE)**
Thank you for standing up,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251112-1&t=22&refcode2=5641_400544_ZwRnqE&akid=5641%2E400544%2EZwRnqE)**

Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power. They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero. We can’t let that happen. Chris Pappas is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves. I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and I want him in the Senate. I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks. The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in: Thank you for standing up, JB Pritzker Governor of Illinois

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Five reasons, five dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friend,
Today, we’d like to give you five reasons why your $5 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC is so important:
1. Unfortunately, the United States has higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world. Our nation has experienced more than 350 shootings so far this year. This is a devastating statistic, but it’s only the tip of the iceberg. We’re working towards a future where this is no longer the reality. But we need your help to fuel this work.

2. The gun lobby is losing influence. People are fed up with the NRA’s corruption. With your support, we can continue to build our Gun Owners for Safety program and provide an alternative to the NRA for responsible gun owners.

3. House Republicans are preparing to move forward a dangerous bill that would force states to allow people to carry hidden, loaded guns...without having to meet that state’s standard. This is legislation we’ve been fighting against since our founding — but there’s a real possibility that Republicans have the votes to pass it this time. Fighting back will take a lot of support, which starts with you.

4. We’re making huge progress. Since GIFFORDS’s founding, we’ve been able to help pass more than 700 gun safety laws nationwide. With your help, we can pass hundreds more in the years to come.

5. Quite frankly, we’re pacing behind our fundraising goal ahead of Saturday’s mid-quarter deadline. This is our very first deadline since the fall elections, and we can’t afford to fall short. We need a surge of support to help us get on track to meet our goals and keep up the momentum.

There are so many more reasons why your contribution is so crucial to our success. We hope that these five have convinced you that your donation today would mean a lot to us.
[**So please, will you chip in $5 or any amount you can to GIFFORDS PAC before our mid-quarter deadline? Do it to help us work towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251112-1-b&t=1&akid=11033%2E3935704%2E8wQUdK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=5&refcode=em251112-1-b&t=2&akid=11033%2E3935704%2E8wQUdK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251112-1-b&t=3&akid=11033%2E3935704%2E8wQUdK)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251112-1-b&t=4&akid=11033%2E3935704%2E8wQUdK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251112-1-b&t=5&akid=11033%2E3935704%2E8wQUdK)**

****

---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&refcode=em251112-1-b&t=7&akid=11033%2E3935704%2E8wQUdK)**
---
****
Thank you.
Team GIFFORDS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=11033%2E3935704%2E8wQUdK) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Raul Ruiz
subject: Prop 50 is just the start
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
People are tired of Republicans’ dysfunction

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=fiOFCSeUN6OXfxspd%2BAuSqOFfBlEsXhuZ1wtX20mluUEAYHik9%2BjFqxFqF8Oyw0C4fdOvQcby9vR3lxRmUpMOKiQV%2FDnvnYBMlVGQt%2BhtPnlOAVdk5sI4W2vL4WyTCGWdS%2FkdU7pLjjGK%2FvKYuF41YDszq53M7gbfYC9SdY%2FJv8vkrclYv2j%2BHIR1MaBratjDL%2BVGlj%2FbOY4YqVjQB%2BcWi3YwK1Ai0OtHMwSQjk5EXFuNMwihs%2FKOCXyZWUKyWU6rlZHm0jQkSvqE3ElTalqmQJFDNzrORVYoNq0CSY8O7fsfYwlOxLM9PYTTSXLRcAx242eilVZiQXOkUm9sLZydpUJZikaLZlRfp65HcDHRJM1ZM%2FuNf2P8Qeh2cDMqO5bVVzyr%2FUNGdUhYEbuNzWpqrPDEki5xfM3jJtolD4aVDZBnDdgpnLbk%2BCRu5GuVITV)
---
| |
---
Hi, it’s Raul. **The will of the people couldn’t be clearer:** End the Republican-led dysfunction and corruption. When faced with Donald Trump’s partisan gerrymandering schemes, Californians responded decisively. Prop 50's voter-powered victory ensures fair district boundaries through 2026 — a crucial safeguard for our democracy. This is a proud moment for California, when people stood up for our democracy against Trump’s authoritarian overreach. But as you know, our work isn't finished. The stakes for the 2026 midterms are high; every vote counts. [We need to be ready, and that’s why I've set a $5,000 mid-month goal to fund our door-to-door outreach to new voters in the district. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

subject: FWD: Thank Justice Sonia Sotomayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’re about to lose your signature spot!
| Trump’s Supreme Court majority is on the verge of DESTROYING the Voting Rights Act!

**Sonia Sotomayor is one of our ONLY fighters for democracy left on the Court, but you still haven’t signed our letter thanking her for her work.** [**We’re giving you ONE more chance to sign by 8am tomorrow, or you will lose your signature spot. THANK JUSTICE SOTOMAYOR NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96439?t=6&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96439?t=7&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
_Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96439?t=8&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR)
**If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96439?t=9&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR)
[**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96439?t=10&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96439?t=11&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96439?t=12&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96439?t=13&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21819%2E878179%2EaqcklR)
---

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: It doesn’t have to be like this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is the conversation I’m interested in having.
#
People always try to make this debate: _“Is so-and-so the future of the Democratic Party?”_ What does that even mean?
The Democratic Party is like an idea — a notion. I don’t spend my days thinking about Democrats. I spend my days and nights thinking about people, about the working class, and about what the right thing to do is.
I’d rather spend my time talking about how we change the conversation so we can actually win things. That’s the conversation I’m interested in having.
**How about we ask what issues are the future of the Democratic Party?**
How about we ask is guaranteed healthcare the future of the Democratic Party? Is banning insider trading by members of Congress the future of the Democratic Party? Is putting limits on lobbying the future of the Democratic Party?
They never ask about the issues — and that’s on purpose. Because then it’s about what we’re saying. It’s about the agenda that speaks to people.
Wouldn’t you rather elect someone who’s trying to do those things — someone who’s working for _us_ and not for special interests?
**That’s what I want. Someone who’s trying. Someone who’s fighting for us.**
If you don’t like where the Democratic Party is right now, the truth is a lot of the action next year will happen in the primaries. That’s when we can change who represents us.
The _people_ define the Democratic Party. Not the DNC. Not incumbents. It doesn’t have to be like this — but **it’s up to us to change it**.
[Will you split a $5 contribution today between our campaign and leadership PAC, Courage to Change — $2.50 for each of our teams — so we can support progressives running for office around the country, up and down the ballot? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251112-ctc.e6L3Ur&refcode=em20251112-10198-P_FND_EGR_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10198%2E2526796%2EbxBA9p)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251112-ctc.e6L3Ur&refcode=em20251112-10198-P_FND_EGR_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10198%2E2526796%2EbxBA9p)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251112-ctc?refcode=em20251112-10198-P_FND_EGR_CTC&t=21&refcode2=10198_2526796_bxBA9p&akid=10198%2E2526796%2EbxBA9p)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251112-10198-P_FND_EGR_CTC&t=22&akid=10198%2E2526796%2EbxBA9p)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=10198%2E2526796%2EbxBA9p) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=10198%2E2526796%2EbxBA9p) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=10198%2E2526796%2EbxBA9p) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=26&akid=10198%2E2526796%2EbxBA9p)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Democrats have been throwing a temper tantrum to try and thwart President Trump's agenda.

And so, Senate Republicans did what we had to do...

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: A big development in Utah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The fight for fairness in Utah has not been and will not be easy

---
_**BREAKING: Utah court approves
new, fair congressional map
after striking down gerrymander**_ Peter, This is a victory for democracy in Utah. For the first time since Proposition 4 was enacted at the ballot box seven years ago, Utahns will now finally be able to vote on a fair congressional map that adheres to that law. Make no mistake, the fight for fairness in Utah has not been and will not be easy, with too many Republicans continuing to do anything they can to overturn redistricting reforms enshrined into law by the people. However, the Court has sent a clear and important message: Proposition 4 is the law of the land, and it must therefore be fully enforced. This serves as a powerful reminder that when voters stand up to reclaim their rights, fairness can prevail. In solidarity, Eric H. Holder, Jr.

clean_body: The fight for fairness in Utah has not been and will not be easy BREAKING: Utah court approves new, fair congressional map after striking down gerrymander Peter, This is a victory for democracy in Utah. For the first time since Proposition 4 was enacted at the ballot box seven years ago, Utahns will now finally be able to vote on a fair congressional map that adheres to that law. Make no mistake, the fight for fairness in Utah has not been and will not be easy, with too many Republicans continuing to do anything they can to overturn redistricting reforms enshrined into law by the people. However, the Court has sent a clear and important message: Proposition 4 is the law of the land, and it must therefore be fully enforced. This serves as a powerful reminder that when voters stand up to reclaim their rights, fairness can prevail. In solidarity, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States | = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. subject: Judicial Watch Statement: Supreme Court to Hear Mississippi Ballot Deadline Case
body:
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton announced today that the Supreme
Court of the United States has granted review in a landmark election
integrity case brought on behalf of the Libertarian Party of
Mississippi.

[alt_text]

[*****]
November 12, 2025

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77691&L=36458&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1taXNzaXNzaXBwaS1iYWxsb3QtZGVhZGxpbmUtY2FzZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e18852826fb81caf7f74f274eabb2817d064cb1a4f6ea025a0b0a7cd932ad4e6]

Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton announced today that the
Supreme Court of the United States has granted review in a landmark
election integrity case brought on behalf of the Libertarian Party of
Mississippi. The case seeks to uphold a ruling by the U.S. Court of
Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, which struck down a Mississippi law
unconstitutionally allowing election officials to count mail-in
ballots received up to five days after Election Day. Fitton stated:

The Supreme Court now has an opportunity to reaffirm that “Election
Day” means what it says under federal law. Counting ballots received
after Election Day not only violates federal law but encourages voter
fraud and undermines voter confidence. The Supreme Court should uphold
the historic decision by the Fifth Circuit that sensibly concluded
that counting ballots received after Election Day is unlawful.”

| | As a movement, we are always praying, asking the Lord, “What are our marching orders for the next season?” And the Lord has been faithful to speak and direct our steps! And the Lord has been very clear to us about the next season.

Next year, we’re launching _Roots of Revival_. _Roots of Revival_ Tour coincides with the celebration of America’s 250. And here’s the heart behind _Roots of Revival_ —America has a deep history of revival throughout our history. _**WATCH THE FULL UPDATE ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_
---
[](https://links.seanfeuchtministries.com/s/c/6wRvVpA6lbjaTMdQ9qvmSILGtpCQ5oDiFUyKbgZQUYGgf_SsB7HFOe1rfMuu4EATiUV14pzyw93b-XiucHrL95odClPL9_6ej7z_ke4LUjwHZi9HmDMG7YpLrniGNNWhrhus-b7D0hg8fGiQZ-_ouctIO-4lwd6M-GIHhJeg3AwYXBKqmfm1A8ke2WCN-NYZeXkZDUacZkiIcLneLFfhM8szU82PjFfZKOEK2ZVaPeurgzw2-JqcHkhlUyQt-9dBb6teVqEPHgPjGYn4ucgKXDD1gzGNTtVIUPyAUDB7BZE01QmfvV044quTptqUcOR8ZxMCpREuHIEUFlBONOqbbdGCwhIY355bWztKQJJAWVcyjRiyoM61WnktkJixCV9or1-NNpYuj96fdsFTvAJTXKx1J8sTyYBmm9HJLuq-NzGkmPXZf2Z5pmr1yjT4tS8/gfd4-4EonetCotDzEd8PZoHlcqAZ62_D/14)

| | There is an active and insidious section of society that is working to undermine, erase, and rewrite our deep Christian heritage. We want to set the record straight by shining a light on the truth of our history.

From Azusa Street to Valley Forge, the shores of Cape Henry to Plymouth Rock, the Boston Commons to Independence Mall, I could go on, and I will! We will spend 2026 visiting every site of revival and calling on God to bring about the next revival in our nation. I believe _Roots of Revival_ is going to be a powerful time for us to look back on all God has done in our nation and call on Him to do it again!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Peter, | | As a movement, we are always praying, asking the Lord, “What are our marching orders for the next season?” And the Lord has been faithful to speak and direct our steps! And the Lord has been very clear to us about the next season. Next year, we’re launching Roots of Revival. Roots of Revival Tour coincides with the celebration of America’s 250. And here’s the heart behind Roots of Revival —America has a deep history of revival throughout our history. WATCH THE FULL UPDATE ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | There is an active and insidious section of society that is working to undermine, erase, and rewrite our deep Christian heritage. We want to set the record straight by shining a light on the truth of our history. From Azusa Street to Valley Forge, the shores of Cape Henry to Plymouth Rock, the Boston Commons to Independence Mall, I could go on, and I will! We will spend 2026 visiting every site of revival and calling on God to bring about the next revival in our nation. I believe Roots of Revival is going to be a powerful time for us to look back on all God has done in our nation and call on Him to do it again! Till All Hear, | | Sean Feucht | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries 310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. subject: The people deserve leaders who don’t cave.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119156438/582129527/-785282667?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5MDlkNi0wMWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERm2etJzUPZDHk22CgTzqN8IzGZ2tyASInisaK6iV6U=)

Peter, While Senate Democrats caved to Trump and his cruel shutdown,**Becca Balint stood firm.** When families are staring down health insurance premiums that will double overnight, when parents are wondering how they’ll afford care for their kids, and when seniors are deciding between medicine and groceries, we don’t need more politicians who back down. **We need leaders who hold the line for their people, no matter the pressure.** [**Becca never gives in when it matters most. She stands strong for our communities— and if you believe we need more leaders like her in Congress, cllck here and pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to keep her fighting for us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119156439/582129528/-86120071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5MDlkNi0wMWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERm2etJzUPZDHk22CgTzqN8IzGZ2tyASInisaK6iV6U=) **Because here’s the truth: when things get hard, Becca doesn’t fold. She digs in. She shows up**. And she keeps fighting for working families, for housing that’s affordable, for healthcare that’s accessible, and for a democracy that actually works for us. While others play politics, Becca’s fighting for the people who can’t afford to lose another day to Washington dysfunction. She’s standing up to corporate greed, to Trump’s chaos, and to the kind of moral cowardice that got us into this mess in the first place. This is the moment that defines what kind of leaders we want in Congress — **those who cave, or those who care.** **[So, If you’re tired of politicians who fold when it matters most, stand with the ones who don’t. Click here to stand with Becca today and show her that you have her back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119156440/582129529/-86120071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5MDlkNi0wMWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERm2etJzUPZDHk22CgTzqN8IzGZ2tyASInisaK6iV6U=)** Together, we can make sure that when the next test comes, our champions are the ones standing tall. — Team Becca | [CLICK HERE TO DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119156441/582129530/-86120071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5MDlkNi0wMWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERm2etJzUPZDHk22CgTzqN8IzGZ2tyASInisaK6iV6U=)

subject: What last week taught us

body:
The American people are paying attention to the chaos coming out of D.C.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119157310/582133393/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTc0ODlkYS0wMmMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydWG1TK87g24Lx1rhULXperZWvFxDFhwy_Bm537E9No=) **[Last week’s elections taught us that the American people are paying attention to the chaos coming out of D.C. — _and they don’t like what they see._ So our job now is to hold Republicans ACCOUNTABLE for the laundry list of disasters they’ve created — and ultimately end their grip on power in Washington. Can I count on you to pitch in just $6 to help us make it happen?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119157311/582133394/1477919608?amount=6&refcode=email_111225_ourjob&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTc0ODlkYS0wMmMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydWG1TK87g24Lx1rhULXperZWvFxDFhwy_Bm537E9No=)** | | **[DONATE $6 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119157312/582133395/1477919608?amount=6&refcode=email_111225_ourjob&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTc0ODlkYS0wMmMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydWG1TK87g24Lx1rhULXperZWvFxDFhwy_Bm537E9No=)**

Let me pull back the curtain and explain our work ahead:
We need to continue to expose the pain Washington Republicans have caused by pushing our government into a full **SHUTDOWN** , and taking a 7-WEEK vacation while millions of American families struggled.
We need to put Trump on blast for his continued attempts to block SNAP payments and leave **MILLIONS** of Americans who already struggle to afford groceries completely in the dark on how they’ll feed their families.
**And we need to hammer the Republican party for voting to inflict ALL of this unnecessary pain and suffering on the American people _just to give their billionaire buddies a massive tax break._**
The 2026 midterm elections will be our BEST and ONLY opportunity to block Republicans from ramming through even more of Trump’s extreme agenda. _**And that starts with holding critical seats like OR-06.**_
**[So please, if you’re with me, chip in whatever you can before my mid-month deadline expires to help us flip the House and stop the MAGA agenda in its tracks. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119157314/582133397/1477919608?amount=6&refcode=email_111225_ourjob&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTc0ODlkYS0wMmMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydWG1TK87g24Lx1rhULXperZWvFxDFhwy_Bm537E9No=)**

Patriot,

After nearly 40 years of lies, corruption, and political games, **Nancy Pelosi is finally calling it quits.**

_Good riddance._

Pelosi made millions while Americans suffered. She turned San Francisco into a dystopian wasteland, pushed Biden’s socialist agenda through Congress, and sneered at working people from her mansion behind armed guards.

Now she’s walking away, leaving behind the wreckage she created.

**But make no mistake: her machine lives on. The same radical insiders she trained are already lining up to take her place.**

clean_body: But make no mistake: her machine lives on. | Patriot, After nearly 40 years of lies, corruption, and political games, Nancy Pelosi is finally calling it quits. Good riddance. Pelosi made millions while Americans suffered. She turned San Francisco into a dystopian wasteland, pushed Biden’s socialist agenda through Congress, and sneered at working people from her mansion behind armed guards. Now she’s walking away, leaving behind the wreckage she created. But make no mistake: her machine lives on. The same radical insiders she trained are already lining up to take her place. I’m running to stop them. To end the Pelosi legacy once and for all. Pelosi spent decades tearing down America. Let’s make her exit the moment we start taking it back. — Josh Cortez | | Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Re: Burnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Can I be honest with you for a minute?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5097%2E35263%2EQTQziy)
Team, Can I be honest with you for a minute? **Political burnout is real.** The constant bad news coming from this administration can be overwhelming, and sometimes it’s easy to feel discouraged or like you just need a break. _**I get it.**_ I’ll never expect you to chip in to every email I send you, but 2026 is fast approaching, and democracy is on the ballot. We’re also up against a tight fundraising deadline, so I had to reach out. I know what you’re thinking — _yes, another deadline._ But amidst all the chaos in Washington, we have to focus on our wins. Democrats swept in elections across the country. In California, voters overwhelmingly approved a redistricting plan to counter Republican gerrymandering. And in Wisconsin, voters have an opportunity to elect Democrats like Rebecca Cooke next year — _who I’m proud to have recently endorsed_ — to Congress and help to flip the House blue. I know it can be hard to stay motivated. But when we work together, we have the power to make a real difference in the fights ahead. **[If you’re able to, will you chip in to my campaign before our mid-quarter fundraising deadline? Your support goes a long way in defending our progress from Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20251112_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5097%2E35263%2EQTQziy)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-nov25.j5UyuQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20251112_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5097%2E35263%2EQTQziy)

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: This is where we take back the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Our country is careening off track. An unaccountable Executive Agency and cowardly Republicans in Congress are turning our economy into a train wreck and alienating our allies around the world.

| Our country is careening off track.

An unaccountable Executive Agency and cowardly Republicans in Congress are turning our economy into a train wreck and alienating our allies around the world.

The question isn’t whether this is the right track for our country — it’s _what are we going to do about it?_

I know what I’m doing.

I’m rolling up my sleeves just like I did when I flipped this seat and became the first Democrat in a century to represent West Michigan. And I’m working hard to retake the House majority.

name: American Patriot Daily
subject: Sean Hannity had one response to Zohran Mamdani you want to sit down for

name: Aftyn Behn
subject: Barreling towards the only red-to-blue in 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
If we win, 2026 shifts.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbaca8bf9-eca2-44da-abbc-5493e80e4d21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| No one thought we would have an opportunity to flip a seat this year. Not the establishment, not the media, and certainly not the GOP. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8929feb-9752-4c32-b57a-925029628bce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But we won our primary with pure grassroots power and showed what’s possible for Democrats in the Deep South. And now, we’re barreling towards the December 2nd special election here in TN-07, where I’ll be facing off against Trump’s hand-picked candidate. Republicans are already pouring money into this race to stop us from flipping this seat, and I’m counting on your support to help me fight back. [Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te56fbd68-eaba-42da-a44d-695c5e7e298b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44411c7b-6526-433b-b60b-06c29b31d0ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d194144-4d01-4510-aa7d-cbb6154fd378/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2480e45c-ca41-4c5b-afe6-cc0a5f5282a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’m an organizer, state rep, and pissed-off social worker running for Congress because we need leadership that meets this moment. For the past decade, I’ve been at the heart of a long-term political project to take back Tennessee, shoulder to shoulder with fellow organizers, activists, movement lawyers, community groups, and mentors who took the time to teach me what real power-building looks like. Now, I’m taking this fight national – and this special election could make history. It’s the only red-to-blue special in the country. If we flip this seat...Republicans lose a vote in the House, and 2026 shifts. It will take record-breaking support to win this race, but I know we have what it takes. [Donate to my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us win this race and flip this seat →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6e7cf43-6526-455e-a8bd-7ed913672039/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Onwards!
– Aftyn Behn

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te03d295a-82b3-4dda-a749-143ee1548b1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I went to law school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40404%2E3422442%2E_qIzh1)
Peter,
Today, I want to share a bit about my story and why I am prepared to fight for working families as California’s next governor.
I decided to go to law school because I knew I wanted to pursue a career that would help people. While in school, I had the opportunity to study under then professor Elizabeth Warren. She helped me see **the power of strong consumer protections—and how clear rules give families a fair shot.**
I first ran for Congress because I saw how special interests and those with power were taking advantage of American families.
That same issue has driven me to run for governor. Our state is facing real challenges—cost of living, a housing crisis, and increasing health care costs. The stakes couldn’t be higher than they are at this moment.
Our campaign has the momentum. I’m prepared to fight for every vote to advance from our primary in June to the general election next November.
But, I need your help to win.
**[Can you pitch in $5 today? Every single donation will make a difference.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251112_1_ak.USkMgx&refcode=em20251112-40404&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40404%2E3422442%2E_qIzh1)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251112_1_ak.USkMgx&refcode=em20251112-40404&t=22&akid=40404%2E3422442%2E_qIzh1)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251112-40404&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40404_3422442__qIzh1&akid=40404%2E3422442%2E_qIzh1)**

subject: Don’t let Democrats steal your retirement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
The Left is scheming to end Social Security tax relief.
| | | | Peter,
This race is bigger than you or me. It could decide control of the U.S. House. And if Democrats get control, the first thing they’ll do is RIP AWAY the Social Security tax relief President Trump delivered through his **One Big Beautiful Bill**.
That’s why I need your immediate support.
**_[Rush a donation RIGHT NOW to help us hold this seat, hold the House, and protect YOUR retirement.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)_**
Trump showed us what’s possible: for the first time in decades, Washington gave our seniors REAL tax relief on Social Security. Millions of hardworking Americans finally saw relief after a lifetime of paying into the system.
But here’s the truth — that relief is **temporary**. Unless we make it permanent, Democrats will raise your taxes again, Peter. They already see your retirement as their piggy bank to fund reckless spending and socialist programs.
---
[PROTECT YOUR RETIREMENT](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
| | This election is our chance to STOP them.
If we win here in Nebraska, we can hold the House and make Trump’s Social Security tax cuts permanent.
If we lose, the Democrats will roll them back and double-tax seniors all over again. Peter, we can’t afford to lose this fight.
**_👉[Please make your donation right now — every dollar brings us closer to holding the House, protecting seniors, and finishing what President Trump started.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)_**
I will not back down. With your help, we can secure a permanent victory for seniors and make sure Washington never taxes Social Security again.
Thank you,

Brett Lindstrom _Republican Candidate for Congress_

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/12/2025
body:
The cost of obedience: How Colorado’s senators strengthened economic malfeasance
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Rocky Mountain Voice isn’t just news—it’s a movement rooted in truth, faith, and community. As Drake Hunter writes in “The Voice of Colorado,” every Coloradan has a story worth telling. Whether you’re a student, business owner, or parent, your voice matters. Write, share, or host an event with RMV—and help shape Colorado’s future one story at a time. **[Read his call to action here!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Governor Jared Polis [unveiled a record $50.7 billion budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), pouring billions into education and public safety despite warnings that state growth is becoming unsustainable. [Denver now leads the nation in inflation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with prices up 1% in two months as living costs soar. At City Hall, the Denver City Council narrowly [rejected Mayor Mike Johnston’s $1.66 billion budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over concerns about transparency—though it will still take effect by law.
Meanwhile, Colorado [faced a federal deadline](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with six other Western states to finalize a Colorado River deal as Lake Powell drops to 28% capacity. The anonymous creator of Do Better Denver—a viral account with over 150,000 followers—[broke her silence,](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) saying her mission is to “call out the failures of our elected officials” amid Denver’s deepening homelessness crisis. And in Washington, the U.S. Supreme Court heard a case against GEO Group’s Aurora ICE detention center, where detainees allege coerced labor and $1-a-day wages; justices appeared [skeptical of the company’s claim](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) of immunity as a federal contractor.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Mike O’Donnell’s “The Cost of Obedience” [blasts Colorado Senators Bennet and Hickenlooper](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for voting against reopening the government, accusing them of deepening the state’s economic pain. Michael J. Badagliacco’s “The Myth of the Montrose Mandate” argues the [recall of Commissioner Scott Mijares was no grassroots triumph](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—only 25% of voters turned out, exposing apathy more than momentum.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, November 12, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[The cost of obedience: How Colorado’s senators strengthened economic malfeasance](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_It is both sad and disappointing that Colorado’s two U.S. senators are incapable of independent thought. As the simple puppets of their overlords, they have selfishly voted fifteen times NOT to reopen the federal government—even though their “no” votes hurt the Coloradans they supposedly represent. Colorado was already struggling economically before the federal shutdown._
_Between January 2023, the start of the post-COVID economy in the U.S., and August 2025, job creation in Colorado had been growing at less than half the national rate and unemployment was growing at around twice the national rate. This was already a recipe for disaster. Things will be much worse now._
_The federal government shutdown seriously impacted the ability of 39,647 active-duty military personnel, 24,194 national guard/reservists, and 54,300 federal government employees in Colorado to support their families and loved ones. Those impacted individuals will have had to draw down whatever savings they had to keep body and soul together, cutting back on spending wherever they can since the shutdown started._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[The Myth of the Montrose Mandate: Low Turnout Exposes Recall Farce](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MICHAEL J BADAGLIACCO "MJB", [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Low turnout undermines recall legitimacy:** Only 25% of Montrose County’s 34,000 registered voters participated in the recall of Commissioner Scott Mijares, making the result a reflection of apathy, not a public mandate.
* **Replacement draws little enthusiasm:** Mijares’ successor, Kirstin Copeland, ran unopposed yet earned fewer votes than the recall itself, with over 8,000 voters skipping her race entirely—showing minimal support for the change.
* **Lesson in civic engagement:** The commentary argues the recall was driven by a small, organized faction, warning that true change comes from broad participation, not exploiting low-turnout elections.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Do Better Denver breaks cover, says her mission is “calling out the failures of our elected officials”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Anonymous activist behind “Do Better Denver” speaks out:** The creator of the viral X and Instagram account—now with over 150,000 followers—gave her first interview, saying she launched the platform out of frustration with Denver’s worsening homelessness and drug crisis.
* **Motivated by empathy, not politics:** She describes herself as unaffiliated and apolitical, claiming her goal is to awaken Denver residents to the “humanitarian crisis” on the streets through unfiltered videos submitted by followers.
* **Criticism and controversy:** While some accuse her of exploiting suffering, she insists her content isn’t exploitation but a call to action—“a way to hold leaders accountable for failing the people of Denver”.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**The Voice of Colorado: A Call to Engage, Write, and Lead Together**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 11** _Across Colorado—from the Eastern Plains to the peaks of the Rockies and Western Slope—every community has a story worth sharing. Yet too many of these stories remain dormant and unheard. At Rocky Mountain Voice (RMV), we’re changing that by reigniting civic engagement and rebuilding trust in media—one authentic and valued voice at a time._
[**Taxpayers Left Holding the Bag After $2 Billion Solar Project Fails**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY GREG WALCHER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 11** _A decade ago, three giant companies took advantage of federal incentives to build the world’s largest solar power plant in the Mojave Desert, known as Ivanpah. It was “the wave of the future,” a new technology that focuses 300,000 computer-controlled mirrors to reflect solar rays onto three boiler towers, each the height of a 40-story building._
[**The Math Behind America’s Slow Surrender**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **BY SEAN POND | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 10** _Every generation tells itself the same lie, that compromise keeps the peace, that negotiation is what holds a democracy together. But if you trace it out in hard math instead of soft emotion, you’ll see that every “reasonable middle ground” we’ve chosen has moved this country one step closer to socialism and one step further from the principles our Founding Fathers built this nation on._

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** **In 1995, New York City’s Veterans Day Parade was nearly canceled due to lack of funds—until Donald Trump stepped in.** He personally donated $200,000 and raised another $300,000 to save the event. Thanks to him, the nation’s oldest and largest Veterans Day Parade—first held in 1919 along Fifth Avenue—marched on.
|

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: Terrorizing children is horrendous. Join the sit-in.
body:
We’re showing up at Broadview.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dbca467be88f/tockcw1cwy-177?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=70a1183fa5&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | This Friday, Movement for Freedom organizers and community allies will hold **a sit-in at the Broadview ICE Detention Facility** to stand against the inhuman detention and deportation of our neighbors.
In a recent and deeply disturbing display of overreach, federal agents detained teacher Diana Patricia Santilana Galeano **at her workplace** , a Spanish-language immersion daycare center in Chicago. **Her arrest took place in front of children** , as agents went from room to room looking to forcibly remove her from the facility. She holds a valid work permit — yet ICE treated her like a criminal, placing fear and trauma into a space meant for safety and learning
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=026b0f7792&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | We refuse to be silent while families are torn apart, while detention and deportation are used as political weapons. What we show and teach children matters. We’re standing together — **for dignity, for safety, and for liberation.**
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=8d8b55fde2&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | If you’re in the Chicagoland area, **we need you with us at Broadview.** Bring your voice, your courage, and your solidarity. ✊🏽 Friday, Nov. 24th, at Broadview ICE Detention Facility📍 1930 Beach St, Broadview, IL⏰ Meet at 8:30 AM
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=7c64ae96fe&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | [If you can’t be there in person, you can still stand with us by contributing to our bail and legal support fund, to ensure every person detained for standing on the side of justice can return home safely.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6e89ab0e80&e=81ab29c4d2)
**This movement doesn’t wait for permission.**
We show up.We protect each other.We fight for freedom — together.
---
| |
_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=4b6b969c0e&e=81ab29c4d2)

Our mailing address is:
Movement 4 Freedom P St NW Washington, DC 200033 USA

You can [update your preferences](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/profile?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&e=81ab29c4d2&c=139f4bea8e) or [unsubscribe](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&t=b&e=81ab29c4d2&c=139f4bea8e)

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Does this make my nose look big?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
My opponents are at it again.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |

**My opponents are at it again.** You might’ve seen it — a big, ugly billboard in Spokane with my face and a cartoon “Pinocchio” nose.Apparently, this is what passes for political discourse these days.A Democrat front group put up that sign because they can’t run on their own record — so they’re misrepresenting mine.Here’s the truth: I voted against the government shutdown and I got on a red-eye plane last night to fly to D.C. to vote again to fund and open up the government.Since being sworn in, I’ve worked alongside President Trump and Speaker Johnson to **pass the largest tax cut in American history** , **secure our borders** , **crack down on urban crime** , and **bring jobs back to our country**. We’ve even helped **restore peace and stability abroad** after years of failed leadership.That’s the record the far-Left doesn’t want you to know about — because it exposes just how out of touch they are with hardworking Americans.So instead, they put up billboards and deluge the papers with letters to the editor, blowing smoke and stretching the truth. But while they play political games, we’re focused on results — real progress that matters to the families, farmers, and small businesses of Central and Eastern Washington.Every dollar we raise helps us fight back against their attacks and make sure the truth gets told loud and clear. [Can I count on you to chip in today and help us set the record straight?](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=e2768e15bc&e=5a45b9550e)Thanks for standing with me — and for helping me keep our campaign focused on the truth, not tall tales
---
|
---
| | -Congressman Michael Baumgartner
---
| |
P.S. The Left may think a cartoon billboard will hurt my credibility — but [with your help, the only thing getting bigger this week will be our fundraising total.](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=6de5495f90&e=5a45b9550e)

Peter,

This is Newt Gingrich. [**_I’m writing to you with an URGENT WARNING._**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/9IONkAnH8kiFN7rzw-rqCgFqj4iLKtqCL6ZrqcEnpM8ISkndRhhAprwTpdE_cBc1T4PpwYzDu_JvrP5JLGn3_mnNEco1HmFySeJoEeRlJc9-GkbWBGZTjGUQTKh2-hGkouZ5-pQPnoq0bpMpPx4cOGnQa9OeEBdS1u8XMQwaEPGlZr-6bxf9p6MyeYajISZOAk2yhABMhwTF8WJR23NBJ2OwVZ85M2Lx_n7xSuZYxsOLu4ikgPZ0WDIPMjF-JbV4GizRy9iH_wH0FpGR_CY2Z7no284bOvpcpM5epuRC1KGVmHmgyc9pe3eJCiCeU9ndghPM6443t4BInwAh1nQ-GgBAn7REcGoErr28HU66NOwp0aMSKqdnhxz5RCKPzQAIqOx4KBl8XsJVEqxT4GTBh0neT7rnRF_x3KwEmsLEU6JLUnqplggZFacErUmzg1jOH1lwtJKJmmY2LPiXJulLuCZtvyUwTqoYrHgmW0ZIJdMEz4UECF_D1bug-_e8SD5n2tva_AgjhEXUZICODB2PerNlZSTuElIxJlyQ_w6mdczitOu-CZTsHgzzV_B5RdvDfZ490kM17kr45dgELVoHA6ldvcy2Y4GBp2aMS5IT499aQFjdWJvgIgOfHHNudKFEm9DuCeSb2U23xXXpmpGiziN1RW5dFfuvFsoANTxWbyexJrfnMqc2rz4cAn9wmqebzhy7R3tZPBmI0PLslcqwUnZzS_A1OwsX8wb17vjugAqQOzUaCheK4e1LZC0YS2kZMeT9hr91EJWlAx5RBVSkLxnCQRisyKSe8FVsPRKdCVzfMsMubvOQl2tVpzCs-38cpd8cdWE3h-RJNZtSNTIwtXx7Fw/bYf9ZuXP8h5Sk50-fdIuOoEQDiec5Ahw/14)

body:
The Democrats are counting on us to be asleep at the wheel
| | | | **
**Patriot,
Look, I’m not gonna sugarcoat it – we’re clinging to a ONE-VOTE majority in the House.

_**One. Single. Vote.**_

That’s the razor-thin line between forward progress, and watching the radical Left torch everything we fought for...

_**CLOSING Biden's open border.
DE-FANGING the Deep State.
PROTECTING girls' sports.
SHRINKING our massive bureaucracy.
CUTTING taxes for ALL Americans.**_

**[It ALL comes to a head on December 2nd in a CRITICAL House Special Election in TN-07 that not nearly enough people on our side are talking about._That ends right now._](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c9186c540ab44f53820d9cc4d9b5ba93&_e=kIZ6UoqCNvdzu5GlmxhH09fCcb-PdYoDzSd_G6ezovbr--2DHCZab-XtmjyI8GQB27gqXJ5TF9yJPSfGlDwW0uZp-Im3XwezSLgujlDVgBiFjkXH4R7EIyLSWlR63-3mD5kw2yV-4ckyB880C6Ricsl3NqxJt3VxTZKeBKv4sEvpFxeiSlbLcYwgHZUVky3z8asxIFIKs78yi5fDBKv-hB3gidE9MwMlGRJ9d7ZZ8vrsw-HSjGGo6RI-z_jwYn7y-aB71B3H_FKZQao9BO2e0C6JBUquc0OeVQWQb4NaDdLiBsODzgRM5YMzUrwM4Q8msDp0zVKurs9tY36_lCGIFSG5iadmtiDwyzbXUXhpVcyum5234QXjebDN6PN8gWKD4cD-lusPzVG3Fko1Q8PqSaQkSI6yqpObhYXqziVZTMKe_KrOMlSiRnG0D3tlswcuf9EpoAl3_Ow8Nwv7DS8vdTsJYznG7uyjXY3ozvSDUmYLddARlScNGlyvbAp5mP1O8BfOUuwDkpPHxczz6EpGcsIGiTtAPJds7zOAtt33jZ3zSgy4RVTYMulOyVqwxIBrW5BuJTOlAHG7iTfpyII-ct1LseeEB5OfQA8-xHM5vt-st8uV0vTyUioNtamLloJRJOs2BNy9fmbIBYz9jCrQKZvZ4P-570VXHVo4GAsPDvWHYyiXOALe86hvOeYiOfqdE4sKmNm-SpHbikqOexyv4uA6iRKuf7DUSXpPlGXwHBI%3D)**

The Democrats are counting on us to be asleep at the wheel. They're flooding money into the district and looking to take it right from under our noses.

_And who are they putting all their money and energy behind?_

**She’s a radical Left Democrat who is rabidly anti-ICE, brags about “bullying” agents during raids, and pushes to defund cops while shielding sanctuary policies.**

Listen, I serve in the House. I watch "The Squad" operate every day. They do not need more company.

**But here’s the good news: President Trump just dropped a massive endorsement on Matt Van Epps. West Point grad. Combat-decorated Army pilot. Nine tours including deployments to Afghanistan and Iraq. The guy’s a warrior.**

President Trump said it himself: “**Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will fight for YOU!** ” I’m proud to stand tall with both of them.

Matt’s not some career politician. He’s one of us – a boots-on-the-ground conservative who’ll stand with me to drain the swamp, keep our border secure, and put America First.

**[I need you in this fight. Chip in $25, $50, $100, $500, whatever you can. Not tomorrow. Not a few days before the election. body:
Throughout the government shutdown, we’ve seen countless examples of Trump and Republicans not caring about you or making your life better.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159035/582138712/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWIxOGYyMy0wOWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PxxNrujV2p8mLWL4mlWP55GwxsBy9Sb31SPcPNgJjkU=&emci=b6767f1f-04c0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=89b18f23-09c0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)

| | Throughout the government shutdown, we've seen countless examples of Trump and Republicans not caring about you or making your life better. From shutting down the government to avoid extending the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help millions of Americans afford health coverage to not funding SNAP benefits for millions of vulnerable Americans, the cruelty is clear. Republicans would only agree to a December vote on the ACA subsidies, not even to support that vote when the time comes. **Just a few short hours before the Senate voted to fund the government, Senate Republicans rejected Senator Tammy Baldwin's plan to extend those expiring ACA subsidies for just one year — on a party-line vote.** _That doesn't inspire much faith in the promised December vote._ Let's not forget — they've spent years trying to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, and now they're refusing to fix the crisis their actions created. Millions of families could soon face skyrocketing premiums and lose access to care — **all because Republican leadership is playing politics with people's health.** Affordable health care access should never be a bargaining chip. We must hold Congress accountable to keep its word and protect the ACA subsidies that millions depend on.**I'll keep working in the Senate to lower health care costs for Oregonians.** [**Add your name to support extending the ACA subsidies and protect affordable health care for every American.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159036/582138713/-1812383069?contactdata=bx9x4uB+4WoQi3mZduqpCzyHFm2d23v5NZvRci6Huiqiohw+pmeib12lOjiE1e+Zq+XknJa6iuR1ZfPY7MLA5is53bz3bHSMClrdMCqjmCTP0gyhT6+20OCe09tqR4K9FrL+/LzJDw7akj7ElXncyA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWIxOGYyMy0wOWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PxxNrujV2p8mLWL4mlWP55GwxsBy9Sb31SPcPNgJjkU=&emci=b6767f1f-04c0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=89b18f23-09c0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159037/582138714/-1812383069?contactdata=bx9x4uB+4WoQi3mZduqpCzyHFm2d23v5NZvRci6Huiqiohw+pmeib12lOjiE1e+Zq+XknJa6iuR1ZfPY7MLA5is53bz3bHSMClrdMCqjmCTP0gyhT6+20OCe09tqR4K9FrL+/LzJDw7akj7ElXncyA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWIxOGYyMy0wOWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PxxNrujV2p8mLWL4mlWP55GwxsBy9Sb31SPcPNgJjkU=&emci=b6767f1f-04c0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=89b18f23-09c0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215) Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Ruth Johnson, Senator
subject: Let's Make MI Elections Stay Citizen-Only 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ruth Johnson * 106 West Allegan #200, Lansing, MI 48933
body:
Voter ID Requirement

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [Donate Here!](https://brightsparkstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=471593be4a&e=9ec31248a9)
---
| | Dear Friend,
Recently, the United States Attorney’s Office [announced](https://brightsparkstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=68b941c6ff&e=9ec31248a9) that criminal charges were filed against Haoxiang Gao — a citizen and national of the People’s Republic of China — for illegally voting in Michigan’s 2024 general election. This is not an isolated incident. A subsequent review by the secretary of state’s office [i](https://brightsparkstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=a2f4127582&e=9ec31248a9)[dentified](https://brightsparkstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=53d9150859&e=9ec31248a9) at least 16 additional non-citizens suspected of voting illegally last November.Michigan’s constitution requires **U.S. citizenship in order to be eligible to vote** in our state’s elections. Unfortunately, there is no system in place to check or verify the eligibility of voters based on citizenship. And proposals passed in recent years by left-leaning interest groups — promoted by deceptive ads run with millions of dollars of out-of-state money — have stripped away protections that had previously been in place to ensure the security and integrity of our elections.That is why my fellow former SOS colleagues and I came together to [oppose](https://brightsparkstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=172059d2d9&e=9ec31248a9) these proposals. Because of these proposals, individuals can now register and vote in our elections without ever being seen once in-person by a clerk or at a secretary of state branch office. Individuals can also register and vote without any photo-ID whatsoever and without any verification of citizenship.**In fact, because of these proposals 29,963 individuals were able to register to vote** _**without**_**a driver’s license or state identification card and without verification of citizenship in the 14 days before or on Election Day in 2024.** To put this number in perspective, the margin in Michigan’s 2016 presidential race was only 10,704 votes. This is a gaping hole in our system. It's time for Michigan to act. In 2026, we must adopt a **Citizen-Only Voting** Amendment to our state constitution. This measure would:
* Require voters to show photo ID to vote, while providing free ID cards for individuals facing hardship, ensuring the law is fair and accessible to all eligible citizens.
* Establish that the secretary of state must verify that only U.S. citizens are eligible to vote in all elections, and
* Mandate that the Secretary of State regularly review and purge voter rolls of individuals whose citizenship status cannot be verified.

Nearly 80% of Michigan voters [support](https://brightsparkstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=3db96030e2&e=9ec31248a9) requiring every voter to use a government-issued identification when casting their ballot. This includes a majority of Democrats, Republicans, and Independents.As we look ahead to 2026, Michigan voters will have a wonderful opportunity to help uphold the integrity of our elections by supporting the recently [approved](https://brightsparkstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=ba8208b799&e=9ec31248a9) Citizen-Only Voting Amendment. Let’s join the growing list of states that have taken action. I encourage every concerned citizen to sign the petition to place this initiative on the ballot and to support it at the polls. It will bring needed balance to previous voting proposals to ensure that our elections continue to be decided only by eligible voters.Will you join me in supporting this measure? To learn more, or to sign please click below.Thank you,Senator Ruth Johnson, Former Secretary of State
---
| [Learn More!](https://brightsparkstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=960ea918b1&e=9ec31248a9)
---

subject: Can you guess who said this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez

| Peter,

Let’s play a quick game.

I want you to guess who said the following quote:

_“Republican men are weak. They are blocking Republican women from leading.”_

Was that said by...

A. Kamala Harris
B. Hillary Clinton
C. A Republican

Here’s another one for you:

_“I’m absolutely disgusted that Republicans have no plan to keep health care premiums from doubling.”_

Was that...

A. Bernie Sanders
B. Me – Linda Sánchez
C. A Republican

Surprise! Both of those quotes are from MAGA extremist Marjorie Taylor Greene. You read that right. Even she knows that when Republicans win, our families lose.

Even Marjorie Taylor Greene can see how broken the Republican Party has become. But instead of fixing it, they’re doubling down on extremism, cruelty, and chaos.

Friend,
This is it—**final 24 hours**.
At this time tomorrow, the **Kingsmill group-rate block closes**. After that, rooms are first-come, full price, and likely scarce. If you plan to be part of the team that **sets the plan for our Party’s future** , **book now** and **register now**.
**📍 Kingsmill Resort, Williamsburg, VA**
**🗓️ December 5–7, 2025**
We’re calling **every Republican** —grassroots leaders, unit chairs, candidates, elected officials, students, donors, first-time activists—to **get in the same room** , align on message, tighten our ground game, and leave with **assignments and timelines** for 2026 and the road to 2027.
**Why you can’t miss this**
* **One table, one plan:** unify the family and eliminate silos
* **Hands-on tracks:** field, finance, digital, legal/ballot ops
* **Real outputs:** targets, calendars, playbooks you’ll deploy Monday

**⚠️ FINAL HOTEL ALERT:** **24 hours left** to secure the **group rate at Kingsmill**. Once it closes, expect higher rates and limited availability.

clean_body: | | | | DON'T WAIT: Book your Advance Hotel NOW! Friend, This is it—final 24 hours. At this time tomorrow, the Kingsmill group-rate block closes. After that, rooms are first-come, full price, and likely scarce. If you plan to be part of the team that sets the plan for our Party’s future , book now and register now. 📍 Kingsmill Resort, Williamsburg, VA 🗓️ December 5–7, 2025 We’re calling every Republican —grassroots leaders, unit chairs, candidates, elected officials, students, donors, first-time activists—to get in the same room , align on message, tighten our ground game, and leave with assignments and timelines for 2026 and the road to 2027. Why you can’t miss this One table, one plan: unify the family and eliminate silos Hands-on tracks: field, finance, digital, legal/ballot ops Real outputs: targets, calendars, playbooks you’ll deploy Monday ⚠️ FINAL HOTEL ALERT: 24 hours left to secure the group rate at Kingsmill. Once it closes, expect higher rates and limited availability. | | | Be there. Bring your team. Let’s build the plan together. — Republican Party of Virginia P.S. Forward this to your friends and family tonight. If they plan to attend, they need to book now to avoid waitlists and higher rates. ⚠️ Important Note on Accommodations: To secure your hotel reservation at the exclusive group rate within the RPV room block, you must purchase a ticket to the Advance. Guests who have not purchased a ticket may have their room reservation released, as priority will be given to confirmed ticket holders. This policy ensures all attendees who are fully registered can take advantage of the negotiated lodging rates and enjoy the full Advance experience. name: Bohannan HQ
subject: Looks like hell froze over:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Gazette: Booing, heckling and walkouts mark Miller-Meeks’ town hall in Keosauqua

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159606/582140735/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI3NGU4Yi0wYWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVTbdyGYMqN1JMF847wFyDmmozf1uIWih8fWTSeGUuI=)

Well, Peter, looks like hell froze over:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159607/582140736/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251112_MM1_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251112_MM1_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=09b74e8b-0ac0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI3NGU4Yi0wYWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVTbdyGYMqN1JMF847wFyDmmozf1uIWih8fWTSeGUuI=)
After months of dodging her own constituents, Mariannette Miller-Meeks finally decided to hold an in-person town hall. And just as you'd expect, the crowd was ready for answers. Iowans from all walks of life showed up with real questions about her attacks on Medicaid, her support for tariffs that are crushing our family farms, and so much more. As a local reporter stated on _MSNBC_ : **"These weren't partisan activists who were flown in. They were local farmers, retirees, working parents and what came through loud and clear was anxiety about affordability and frustration that Washington's fights aren't fixing it."

But instead of being honest with the people she serves, Miller-Meeks spent the evening reheating the same tired party talking points.** When asked about Medicaid, she claimed she was strengthening it — a bold-faced lie. When the topic of tariffs came up, she shifted the blame to the previous administration, then somehow found time to brag about supporting Argentina while Iowa families struggle at home.

After all these months, she finally faced the people she's supposed to represent, and the evidence couldn't be clearer: **Iowans deserve better than a party marionette who will always put her district last.**

clean_body: The Gazette: Booing, heckling and walkouts mark Miller-Meeks’ town hall in Keosauqua | = Well, Peter, looks like hell froze over: = After months of dodging her own constituents, Mariannette Miller-Meeks finally decided to hold an in-person town hall. And just as you'd expect, the crowd was ready for answers. Iowans from all walks of life showed up with real questions about her attacks on Medicaid, her support for tariffs that are crushing our family farms, and so much more. As a local reporter stated on MSNBC : "These weren't partisan activists who were flown in. They were local farmers, retirees, working parents and what came through loud and clear was anxiety about affordability and frustration that Washington's fights aren't fixing it." But instead of being honest with the people she serves, Miller-Meeks spent the evening reheating the same tired party talking points. When asked about Medicaid, she claimed she was strengthening it — a bold-faced lie. When the topic of tariffs came up, she shifted the blame to the previous administration, then somehow found time to brag about supporting Argentina while Iowa families struggle at home. After all these months, she finally faced the people she's supposed to represent, and the evidence couldn't be clearer: Iowans deserve better than a party marionette who will always put her district last. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: name: Seth Moulton
subject: I said what I said
body:
| |
---
Hi friend,

I’ve learned something over the years, in the Marines, in Congress, and on the campaign trail: telling the truth shouldn’t be a radical act. But these days, it is. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159911/582141794/-2100995553?refcode=251112_sm_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2I5M2ZhYy0wYWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0DT8yDoI2M3BKWu1YPEI7ODDgiOJ0O-g4HfzigfeQlI=&emci=6e137dd9-ffbf-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e7b93fac-0ac0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=194769) _If you want to check it out on Instagram, you can do that[here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159912/582141808/-1556188595?igsh=MWRnaDk0dzJmMzZmMA==&refcode=251112_sm_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2I5M2ZhYy0wYWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0DT8yDoI2M3BKWu1YPEI7ODDgiOJ0O-g4HfzigfeQlI=&emci=6e137dd9-ffbf-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e7b93fac-0ac0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=194769)_ But let me be clear, I stand by what I said about Donald Trump and the Epstein files. This administration has demonstrated time and time again that if you’re a criminal, you can buy your Get Out Of Jail Free card. Too many of those in power have turned a blind eye to the obvious surrounding Trump and Epstein, and I am tired of it. Leadership isn’t about playing it safe or saying what’s popular. It’s about using a little common sense, trusting what you know to be right, and being willing to back it up when it counts. We need more honesty in politics, not less, and a lot fewer people who confuse silence for strength. That’s what this campaign is about: courage, integrity, and the kind of straight talk that helps rebuild trust in government. **[If you’re ready for more common sense in Washington and more leaders who aren’t afraid to say what they mean, donate today to help hit our mid-month goal and keep this campaign powered through the rest of the year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159913/582141813/2090747700?refcode=251112_sm_mm2_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2I5M2ZhYy0wYWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0DT8yDoI2M3BKWu1YPEI7ODDgiOJ0O-g4HfzigfeQlI=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119159914/582141820/1375639745?refcode=251112_sm_mm2_b1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2I5M2ZhYy0wYWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0DT8yDoI2M3BKWu1YPEI7ODDgiOJ0O-g4HfzigfeQlI=)**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/353d1b59-1136-4575-bde5-4a6a06761097?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
BOISE, Idaho - Senator Brian Lenney issued a formal inquiry today regarding Idaho's allocation of $546,400 in annual taxpayer funding to the Hispanic Commission while providing zero dollars in equivalent recognition for residents of Scotch-Irish descent.
"My Scotch-Irish ancestors died in Pennsylvania coal mines where life expectancy averaged 40 to 50 years due to cave-ins, gas explosions, and lung disease, labored on Virginia tobacco plantations where two-thirds of indentured servants died within months of arrival from disease and exhaustion, and perished in Carolina turpentine camps that federal inspectors described as a 'human slaughter pen' while earning 50 cents to one dollar per day," Senator Lenney stated.
> "They received zero reparations, zero land grants, and zero acknowledgment from any government entity at any level. The policy was straightforward: sign a seven-year indenture contract and hope to survive it."
Senator Lenney noted that documented Scotch-Irish indentured servitude in America dates to the 1620s and continued in major waves through 1775, with servants typically bound for four to seven years of labor in exchange for passage to the colonies.
> "If Idaho has determined that half-million-dollar ancestry-based commissions serve a legitimate public purpose, the state needs to explain its selection criteria," Senator Lenney added.
> "Alternatively, Idaho could eliminate all ethnicity-based funding and classify residents exclusively as Idahoans on government forms, regardless of whether their ancestors died in coal mines, on plantations, in turpentine camps, or from natural causes."
**Senator Lenney is requesting a written response from the Governor 's office by December 15, 2025.**
Contact:
Brian Lenney(R)
BLenney@senate.idaho.gov
District 13
2nd term

Nampa, ID 83653-3753
Home (208) 614-1289
