name: Wes Moore
subject: We still have work to get done
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=909%2E1086043%2Egt7mmE)
The frustration that people feel is real, Peter.
Young people, especially young men, are seeking help, and we’re making sure we focus on them.
This isn’t just a talking point for me, Peter — it’s personal.
My family did not have it easy. My grandfather was chased out of the country by white supremacists. I lost my father when I was young because he didn’t have access to proper healthcare.
**Those experiences shaped me. And they fuel my belief that there has to be a better way.**
That’s why my administration is stepping up and providing the resources young people need to build a future right here in Maryland.
No more _“no and slow.”_ We’re saying _“yes and now.”_
We’re building momentum in Maryland, building pathways to work, wages, and wealth.
**[If you’re in this fight with me, please chip in $5 today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251112-1.wttwQd&refcode=em-20251112-1&t=4&akid=909%2E1086043%2Egt7mmE)**

Wes

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I don’t care what they say about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Every single day I come to work in Washington, I know exactly what I'm up against.

It's a constant stream of attacks, threats, and millions of dollars spent by right-wing operatives, the MAGA extremists, and those who want to see me silenced. They don’t want accountability, they don’t want justice, and they certainly don’t want a committed Democrat like me fighting for common-sense reform.

They launch these attacks for one reason: They think if they apply enough pressure, I’ll back down. They think I’ll stop exposing their extremism, stop fighting for our democracy, and stop putting the American people first.

They are wrong.

As a former prosecutor and a public servant, I have never backed down to a bully in my life, and I am not starting now. Their noise is just proof that we are hitting them where it hurts.

But fighting this extremism takes resources. They rely on dark money and billionaire donors. We rely on people like you.

Our team has set a crucial end-of-week fundraising deadline, and we need a massive surge of grassroots support to show the opposition we are unified and ready to fight back.

If you stand with me against the bullies and believe in fighting for a more just, safer America, please chip in $25 right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2025-FR-November?&refcode=E16144-20251112-DontBackDown-SL-GOP&amount=25]

Let's make sure they hear us loud and clear: We are not going anywhere.

— Eric Swalwell

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: By the numbers:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Back in January it was hard to think this far ahead. After everything that happened that first month, it’s a safe bet that you were asking yourself how we were going to make it through four more years of this.
#
Peter —
Back in January it was hard to think this far ahead. After everything that happened that first month, it’s a safe bet that you were asking yourself how we were going to make it through four more years of this.
Now, here we are. It’s November, and Democrats just had one of the most successful off-year elections ever. It wasn’t easy, it was never guaranteed, but we made it this far taking everything one week at a time.
When you break it down, going one week at a time makes things feel a little bit more digestible. So, check this out:
**155.** That’s the number of weeks until the 2028 elections.
**50.** That’s the number of weeks until the 2026 elections.
**$21.** That’s the average donation to VoteVets this year.
**$100,000.** That’s what VoteVets needs to raise by our mid-quarter deadline on November 15th.
At $21, that means we’ll need to take in close to 4700 donations over the next four days.
So, we’re asking you to chip in that $21 today. Because by the time you’ve given your $21, somebody else has already added theirs. And if tons of people do the same, we can knock that goal out fast. That’s how we make it through this — one at a time.
**[Please, make a $21 donation (or more, if you can) and help VoteVets raise what we need to elect Veterans around the country in 2026.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19338?c0=vv-pac-em-nov25.7W4O4U&refcode=em251109-1-120&t=1&akid=34762%2E3013755%2EziSWkn)

name: Research Team (Voter Action Project)
subject: Do you think voter ID requirements are just new poll taxes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Folks,
The Twenty-fourth Amendment, ratified in 1964, prohibits both Congress and the states from conditioning the right to vote in federal elections on payment of a poll tax or any other type of tax . Poll taxes for State and local elections were declared unconstitutional by the Supreme Court in the case Harper vs. Virginia State Board of Elections . However, supporters of voting rights allege that voter identification requirements passed in recent legislation amount to a modern-day poll tax.
Texas, for example, requires photo ID to vote, yet each of those methods -- a Texas Driver's License, Texas Personal Identification Card, or Texas Handgun License -- cost money to acquire. In addition, their other acceptable forms of ID have a cost -- both a United States Passport and United States Citizenship Certificate must be purchased, and a United States Military Identification Card requires military service or work as a contractor.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about this issue. Please take our quick survey:

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll. For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com . Folks, The Twenty-fourth Amendment, ratified in 1964, prohibits both Congress and the states from conditioning the right to vote in federal elections on payment of a poll tax or any other type of tax . Poll taxes for State and local elections were declared unconstitutional by the Supreme Court in the case Harper vs. Virginia State Board of Elections . However, supporters of voting rights allege that voter identification requirements passed in recent legislation amount to a modern-day poll tax. Texas, for example, requires photo ID to vote, yet each of those methods -- a Texas Driver's License, Texas Personal Identification Card, or Texas Handgun License -- cost money to acquire. In addition, their other acceptable forms of ID have a cost -- both a United States Passport and United States Citizenship Certificate must be purchased, and a United States Military Identification Card requires military service or work as a contractor. We're looking to see how our supporters feel about this issue. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: We’re powered by you, Peter
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251112-1620-foote&t=1001&akid=1620%2E342411%2ErW412g ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Squad Victory Fund isn’t powered by corporate PACs or billionaire
donors — and that’s by design.

We’re powered by you.

By working-class people across the country who are ready to transform our
government — and who believe that real change comes from the ground up,
not the top down.

This movement is different. We’re not just fighting for the next election
— we’re building lasting power at every level for our communities, our
neighbors, and our collective future.

Together, here’s what we’re making possible:

✅ Defending progressive champions like Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and
Rashida — voices who bring the needs and dreams of working people into the
halls of Congress every single day.

✅ Strengthening our people-powered grassroots movement rooted in justice,
equity, and solidarity.

✅ Standing up to the far-right’s corruption and extremism — and refusing
to back down.

The Squad isn’t just playing defense. We’re pushing forward with a bold,
people-first agenda: Medicare for All, climate action, student debt
cancellation, affordable housing — a vision for a country that finally
works for the many, not the wealthy few.

But this work only moves when we do — together.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251112-movement.jJlT6q&refcode=em20251112-1620&amount=3&t=1002&akid=1620%2E342411%2ErW412g ]Will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund today to
help keep our movement strong and growing?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251112-movement.jJlT6q&refcode=em20251112-1620&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1620%2E342411%2ErW412g ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1620%2E342411%2ErW412g

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: 8 weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
Republicans took more vacation days in the last two months than most Americans have taken in the last three years. |
---
Peter, Yesterday, Republicans returned to Washington to _finally_ do their jobs after an 8-week-long taxpayer-funded vacation, though they got a little touchy when I called them out on it: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119162901/582152106/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251112_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTMyNzIyOC0xNGMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-RWlt69OrWfEi7N1G8uWBQGZAh-uAXk8V0KV5IRAgc=) Speaker Mike Johnson canceled votes, sent Republicans home for vacation, and refused to convene the House for nearly two months. Meanwhile, federal workers went without paychecks and Americans across the country stressed over the increases to their health care premiums. The Republican party is responsible for this shutdown, and they could’ve, at any opportunity, agreed to extend health care subsidies to reopen the government and get back to business. [It’s clear that Republicans cannot govern effectively. I’m fighting to keep them accountable — but I need your help to do it. clean_body: Republicans took more vacation days in the last two months than most Americans have taken in the last three years. | Peter, Yesterday, Republicans returned to Washington to finally do their jobs after an 8-week-long taxpayer-funded vacation, though they got a little touchy when I called them out on it: = Speaker Mike Johnson canceled votes, sent Republicans home for vacation, and refused to convene the House for nearly two months. Meanwhile, federal workers went without paychecks and Americans across the country stressed over the increases to their health care premiums. The Republican party is responsible for this shutdown, and they could’ve, at any opportunity, agreed to extend health care subsidies to reopen the government and get back to business. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for standing with me, Yassamin Ansari Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

Thanks so much,
Team Cooper for NC
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=42%2E124072%2Es73WCr)**

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=42%2E124072%2Es73WCr)

name: Maurice Mitchell, Working Families Party
subject: Dems are squandering the historic turnout from last week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Last Tuesday was a watershed moment for our movement, Peter. WFP won new working-class champions _everywhere_ , and this week, we were looking forward to doing a full recap of some of our biggest wins. **But the establishment wing of the Democratic party had other plans.** It took them less than a week to prove they learned nothing from our electoral successes by capitulating to Trump and Senate Republicans instead. It’s an utter disgrace. _They snatched defeat from the jaws of victory_ , and got nothing in return. But in doing so, they’ve made our path forward as clear as ever: **We must continue to fight for working families. And fight unwaveringly against authoritarianism — not bend the knee to it.** **And we cannot rely on the two major parties to do either of those things. We need an alternative.** The Working Families Party is building that alternative. And the last week of electoral wins and Democratic establishment betrayal proves that the people are hungry for it. [So before we dive into our election night recap — and if you want to help build the fight for a new way of American politics — become a dues-paying member of WFP today as we gear up for the 2026 midterms AND the dozen runoff elections we’ll be a part of over the coming weeks.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9F7xEkQWYOMVTOBqG9TnLkI6D8XVJE5-qP4mheRA4PDqA2qGBweI-lR5H5UY3NPuCyE7CXhu6FwuPQlDp4T8c88OWYT5ZV23CqBZqiIDj6NFh8J7rY4FtKIustGfRlHS3Q7tFIvc8lBS4L2zOS0WwY33mDPLHsvADJL6IkZgKnggG4QcYVPQ6ohIwcAyZjyK_0NHpqs94AlyTzYtlW5IpLhNNMAZ0fn-po99qL2n3b_0Y4MXQqCQdi1wJtGMek5TAUeTT0iLzcSuUfR3kRVCV4rf2qPf-rJQNQtSPeJpbbz6gd4SBv9oD3Jx9Rc7YTYPNWa5p0x7HQePihJjp3fJQr6f4XY_r3hCbO_p7ZMrM4XUru7wlJDb1zUEcwrWWaYMnzyQkw53tZVWrz0tlJKoXC-RTsI9jo2Rk-zePwd-oLGG5eP7C5J9JEyNFufADbAbQ/4lj/VTjAeVAfRXS7-6FqrfLCgA/h0/h001.JEUiLWEM5W729YTjvKEcnBayiCass429CHJAno3Qmks) **[Become a member »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9F7xEkQWYOMVTOBqG9TnLkI6D8XVJE5-qP4mheRA4PDqA2qGBweI-lR5H5UY3NPuCyE7CXhu6FwuPQlDp4T8c83ry9RjF3RC8xmm5fqPFflnVMVXdmYa54Zgjh45JEdRN03N73cIwlHEwCctrqRiAXnDSI-vm7AuECqLyVHRLXHpI3ETgqlWvuwkFEjED2d6Kgfs_yTjjj4-CMAJQBOP8sHTnTICsbNLwxNDdjJLOtzANV659MMsbIMq9jTAoFBGDfLoc1yKkdfd0uqHJ_pRxGqngWzlMVvE8dXRuQ30g3PG2kLVHopIB9ye9Mqr-JVvsR-RLJ3vYkAUC3kiyFx_sKTeMY1T4kxE-V8NCCztAAb6A9rt-AyEQ9kKlcpVC_JSwNqzP5UCP2K0bKJHWfW6hSlMVdTUellhnR9yJZEZbvtPZAABJbyWZPgdXgC8uMM9k/4lj/VTjAeVAfRXS7-6FqrfLCgA/h1/h001.v3acydzH-3SYSBgntdcVG-LdG3t9hQTgronPxRagPJw)** As promised, we don’t want to let the failures of some establishment Democrats take away from last week’s historic turnout, so we hope you’ll take a few minutes to do a deep dive with us. **Starting with the obvious — Zohran Mamdani.** Despite $40 million in super PAC spending against him, he earned more votes than any NYC mayoral candidate since 1965. _And more people voted on the WFP line than any mayoral election in the Party’s history._ Even though the prevailing ‘wisdom’ of pundits and think tanks has always been to triangulate and avoid ruffling feathers, **Zohran’s relentless focus on affordability never faltered. And he won in a landslide.** But like we said last Tuesday, this victory is bigger than Zohran — and he’d agree. From coast to coast, candidates of every background proved that whether it’s about groceries, public transportation, rent prices, or simply sticking it to the billionaires, putting working families first is a winning message.
* Billionaire Jeffrey Yass spent more than $3.5 million dollars to take out Pennsylvania’s Democratic Supreme Court justices, but the sitting justices were retained by historic margins.

* In Seattle, lifelong activist **Katie Wilson** is on the brink of being elected Mayor. And **Dionne Foster** upset the City Council president by prioritizing the needs of working families in her community.

* Public servant and union member **Shenise Turner-Sloss** upset incumbent **Jeffrey J. Mims, Jr**. in the Dayton, OH mayoral race by committing to investing in neighborhoods.

* Mom and educator **Ghazala Hashmi** — who WFP backed in her hard-fought primary for Lt. Governor of Virginia — will be the first woman Muslim statewide officeholder in America.

* **Dr. Alicia Johnson** defeated a Republican for statewide office in Georgia and will now serve on the Georgia Public Service Commission.

* Community organizer **Denzel McCampbell** won his race for Detroit City Council with a powerful army of volunteers behind him.

* WFP delivered a clean sweep in the Denver School Board elections after anti-union dark money flooded the race.

* Candidates running exclusively on the WFP line upset their Democratic and Republican opponents in Hartford and Bridgeport, CT, as well as Newburgh and Onondaga County, NY.

* **We’re also gearing up for a dozen fierce runoff elections in Albuquerque, Jersey City, Atlanta, and more. And we’ll be sharing more about those races soon, plus new opportunities to help them win in overtime.**

In total, WFP endorsed over 700 candidates across the country, and millions upon millions of voters stepped up to say, loudly and clearly, that they’re tired of a status quo that isn’t working for them. While corporate Democrats sit idly in the face of Trump’s power-grabs — or even stab us all in the backs like they did on Sunday — our working-class champions are offering us a glimpse of a political system that so many of us have been dreaming of our entire lives. A system that listens to, stands with, and _fights for_ working people. No pandering. No focus-groups. No think tanks. No pundits. Just an unapologetic belief that it shouldn’t be this hard to make ends meet — and that politicians have a duty to wield their power for the good of the many, not the few. clean_body: | | | Last Tuesday was a watershed moment for our movement, Peter. WFP won new working-class champions everywhere , and this week, we were looking forward to doing a full recap of some of our biggest wins. But the establishment wing of the Democratic party had other plans. It took them less than a week to prove they learned nothing from our electoral successes by capitulating to Trump and Senate Republicans instead. It’s an utter disgrace. They snatched defeat from the jaws of victory , and got nothing in return. But in doing so, they’ve made our path forward as clear as ever: We must continue to fight for working families. And fight unwaveringly against authoritarianism — not bend the knee to it. And we cannot rely on the two major parties to do either of those things. We need an alternative. The Working Families Party is building that alternative. And the last week of electoral wins and Democratic establishment betrayal proves that the people are hungry for it. As promised, we don’t want to let the failures of some establishment Democrats take away from last week’s historic turnout, so we hope you’ll take a few minutes to do a deep dive with us. Starting with the obvious — Zohran Mamdani. Despite $40 million in super PAC spending against him, he earned more votes than any NYC mayoral candidate since 1965. And more people voted on the WFP line than any mayoral election in the Party’s history. Even though the prevailing ‘wisdom’ of pundits and think tanks has always been to triangulate and avoid ruffling feathers, Zohran’s relentless focus on affordability never faltered. And he won in a landslide. But like we said last Tuesday, this victory is bigger than Zohran — and he’d agree. From coast to coast, candidates of every background proved that whether it’s about groceries, public transportation, rent prices, or simply sticking it to the billionaires, putting working families first is a winning message. Billionaire Jeffrey Yass spent more than $3.5 million dollars to take out Pennsylvania’s Democratic Supreme Court justices, but the sitting justices were retained by historic margins. In Seattle, lifelong activist Katie Wilson is on the brink of being elected Mayor. And Dionne Foster upset the City Council president by prioritizing the needs of working families in her community. Public servant and union member Shenise Turner-Sloss upset incumbent Jeffrey J. Mims, Jr. in the Dayton, OH mayoral race by committing to investing in neighborhoods. Mom and educator Ghazala Hashmi — who WFP backed in her hard-fought primary for Lt. Governor of Virginia — will be the first woman Muslim statewide officeholder in America. Dr. Alicia Johnson defeated a Republican for statewide office in Georgia and will now serve on the Georgia Public Service Commission. Community organizer Denzel McCampbell won his race for Detroit City Council with a powerful army of volunteers behind him. WFP delivered a clean sweep in the Denver School Board elections after anti-union dark money flooded the race. Candidates running exclusively on the WFP line upset their Democratic and Republican opponents in Hartford and Bridgeport, CT, as well as Newburgh and Onondaga County, NY. We’re also gearing up for a dozen fierce runoff elections in Albuquerque, Jersey City, Atlanta, and more. And we’ll be sharing more about those races soon, plus new opportunities to help them win in overtime. In total, WFP endorsed over 700 candidates across the country, and millions upon millions of voters stepped up to say, loudly and clearly, that they’re tired of a status quo that isn’t working for them. While corporate Democrats sit idly in the face of Trump’s power-grabs — or even stab us all in the backs like they did on Sunday — our working-class champions are offering us a glimpse of a political system that so many of us have been dreaming of our entire lives. A system that listens to, stands with, and fights for working people. No pandering. No focus-groups. No think tanks. No pundits. Just an unapologetic belief that it shouldn’t be this hard to make ends meet — and that politicians have a duty to wield their power for the good of the many, not the few. We can’t wait to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with you all in the days and months ahead. With love and solidarity, Maurice Mitchell National Director, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . body:
| | | Hi there -- It's Pat, the DSCC's Research Director, with an urgent request.

Democrats won _resounding_ victories in this year's elections -- and **now I need to confirm that voters like you are ready to turn this momentum into action by committing to vote for Democrats in the midterms.**

Believe it or not, studies show that the more people make a firm _commitment_ to vote, the more _dramatically_ voter turnout rises! In fact, if everyone receiving this message pledges to cast a ballot, that could drive up to 100,000 more Democratic voters to the polls -- and together, those votes could help flip _multiple_ seats blue next year!

We'll need every ballot we can get to win every seat possible so we can hold Trump accountable, **so please, will you pledge to vote for Democrats in the midterms?**

subject: We’re putting corporate Democrats in NYC on notice 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Like our Executive Director Alexandra Rojas told Al Jazeera, Zohran
Mamdani’s victory in NYC last week “put every single entrenched, corporate
Democrat on notice. If you’re not serving the interests of everyday
people, your time in office is limited.”

Here at Justice Democrats, we’re already putting those words into action.
In districts across the country, we’ve endorsed four working-class,
progressive candidates to take on do-nothing Democratic incumbents in next
year’s primaries — and more are on the way.

Now, we’re setting our sights on congressional races in New York City so
we can take the same energy Zohran built in his race for mayor and use it
to reshape the Democratic Party in Washington.

That’s why we just launched our “Primary NYC’s Corporate Democrats Fund.”

With your support, we’re preparing to help elect working-class,
progressive candidates challenging the corporate and billionaire-backed
Democrats currently representing (and failing) NYC districts in Congress.

This is how we ensure Zohran’s victory wasn’t just a moment, but a
movement.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251112.5PKPS5&refcode=em20251112-37187&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37187%2E1203867%2E_3hMLA ]If everyone reading this pitches in $10 or more, we could clean up
Congress and build the Democratic Party we deserve. Can you chip in to

Let’s send more corporate stooges like Andrew Cuomo into a long-overdue
retirement.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Out of ideas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend, Trump’s presidency is one long Constitutional crisis.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1952%2E791427%2EbIW5qJ)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4691?t=2&akid=1952%2E791427%2EbIW5qJ)
Trump is completely out of ideas, so now he’s attacking me for knowing what it says in the Constitution. Really!
Well, since Trump doesn’t seem to understand, here are some of the ways he has violated the Constitution since January:
* He illegally slashed funding for lifesaving programs and defunded entire federal agencies without Congressional approval
* He has blatantly ignored federal court orders in complete disregard for the separation of powers
* He allowed ICE to suspend the Fifth Amendment right of due process and deport people without trial
* He violated the First Amendment by detaining college students for exercising free speech and criticizing Israel
* He trampled on the freedom of the press by using the power of his government to punish news outlets and journalists who disagreed with him
* He bombs other countries and wages war without Congressional approval in violation of the War Powers Clause
* He uses fake “emergencies” to federalize the National Guard and occupy American cities
* He constantly threatens to deport me despite being a US citizen

Friend, Trump’s presidency is one long Constitutional crisis. And the Republican Party that controls both Congress and the Supreme Court has happily allowed him to grow his power and act like a dictator.
But look, last week’s elections proved that Trump is now weaker than ever. Working-class voters have turned on him. He is a failure. We have an opportunity in the upcoming midterms to take back control of Congress and pull the emergency brake on this dumpster fire of a presidency.
That starts with winning our race here in Minnesota’s 5th and sending our progressive movement back to Washington to hold Trump accountable.
So, if you’re with me on this:
**[Make a contribution to my campaign and help me continue to fight back against this wannabe dictator and the entire far-right that enables him. We can’t let our democracy go by the wayside if we are to undo the damage of his extreme, billionaire-first agenda.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov25.AgDe-P&refcode=em251112-1-180&t=3&akid=1952%2E791427%2EbIW5qJ)

name: Chris Pappas
subject: What does ice cream have to do with public service?
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=3440%2E582294%2EuWhzb7 ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=3440%2E582294%2EuWhzb7 ]Chris Pappas for Senate

Well before my days in public service, I was in the kitchen at my family’s
restaurant in Manchester, making homemade ice cream.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251112_1_icecream.5OZAEV&refcode=em20251112-1&t=1003&akid=3440%2E582294%2EuWhzb7 ]I’ll explain what that has to do with running for the Senate in a
moment, but if you’re in a hurry, will you chip in to our campaign today?

So you may be wondering: What does making ice cream
have to do with running for the U.S. Senate?

Quite simply, it taught me the value of hard work.

In a year we’d churn out more than 35,000 gallons of ice cream, which is
no easy feat! It taught me lessons I’ve carried with me throughout my
life:

🍨 Show up and work hard every single day.

🍨 Treat everyone with respect.

🍨 Lead with service.

These values are what I brought with me to the halls of Congress, and
they’re what I’ll bring to the Senate.

This campaign isn’t about special interests or soundbites. It’s about
showing up for Granite Staters every single day.

We’re
facing a tough race. John Sununu has entered the competition, and it’s
only going to get more difficult from here. Senate Republicans and GOP
super PACs are behind him every step of the way to flip this seat.

But I believe we can win the same way we built our family business: with
heart, hustle, and a whole lot of community.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251112_1_icecream.5OZAEV&refcode=em20251112-1&t=1004&akid=3440%2E582294%2EuWhzb7 ]If
you’re with me, will you chip in $5 or whatever you’re able
to today so we can keep this campaign rooted in New Hampshire values?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251112_1_icecream.wFriIA&amount=5&refcode=em20251112-1&t=1023&akid=3440%2E582294%2EuWhzb7 ]Donate $5 »

Thank you,

Chris Pappas

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3440%2E582294%2EuWhzb7

name: Nico, United We Dream
subject: DACA recipients must be able to live with dignity and safety
body:
No matter what happens, we have each other’s backs. | | | Peter, We’ve been closely following updates in the Texas DACA case before Judge Hanen, and want to keep you in the loop. New briefs were filed on Monday, but the most important thing to know right now is that **renewals are still open and DACA recipients remain protected** — and are working to ensure recipients _stay_ protected. Renewals continue to be processed for the whole country with FULL DACA benefits, including access to work permits, for all DACA recipients, including those in Texas. Meanwhile, it’s also critical to recognize that _immigration agents are escalating their actions_ across the country. DACA recipients are being disappeared and thrown into detention without any form of due process, despite having current protections. **No matter what happens, we have each other’s backs.** United We Dream is here to provide clear information, support, and space to process what this latest update and the future of DACA mean for our communities. This remains true: **DACA recipients, immigrant youth, and all immigrants must be able to live with dignity and safety.****** **[United We Dream is ready to provide accurate and trusted information as DACA makes its way through the courts, share up-to-date information and resources for DACA recipients and loved ones, and empower each other to raise our voices against agents snatching immigrants in our communities. Please donate to help us continue this vital work today:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAe8Sk-mszjkMhsJ-F4ZsGR5BVlj9mZDeZJF-qxCLmcdarajeJrDtdwIe85DbtjVtnJZ9Rny2h7Oy0ydizc9U4zALJsRuiirmsm1p6YW8asBzZLbxIDikJmHI-R7gw_fH9qx2tooFSmFQll9Zgv04vdN_RH59BM1ERj6iy2PWcpzxJTxjUjs67qun01_PH2lqFYFZaODlrvIEZv6URrU8hU6JkIIuv1qjkM6OpI2asQrdZEqLonSdeb1euVGGwIkIAXWGEY0n77tSf5_s6sDaPVZufOq81V4KyrJZ1fIfI4Wzvd-S43Me6jANEd74gffHxVVcN5R0GCWvrtgZF6Bfd-1DVYKbF1obysSjD48b7GTA102cWAFF0a8_T-rFKcbxjMDAQOs1Nzi6X1_lRvc5zlw90qvLz5mTL2f39mHK0CwZPUjSnUqpy-m4YZ3UGgEGxLEzyPrOML1Jj8B1FW9WqJO2Bju9MRKGW_4AFKIDoGaVY/4lj/-LLh-oyFRhOr5KpAxUuNMg/h0/h001.EiEay2puGR-_u1P5mIFxnthZ4zOfumZMkQxMzyneUWs)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAe8Sk-mszjkMhsJ-F4ZsGR5BVlj9mZDeZJF-qxCLmcdarajeJrDtdwIe85DbtjVtnJHakmtEq546vr9JFkGUyfvRwomav5ADFmY0at3TfHl9XyUjIeGQt5rQTdT9N-SufAGXqTKKSfegSRUZU2ZZVPZfy82VmH0V_EqQQEvcsn_ivEzhijherJjqJcAKqig3vs8zSdQ-DrZhiSkHriEYE5p1exzHw9sCZZmCART4vYYtHwkpI6Y1-GLAmYgkN1Jc2Y4ODX_5nF_8DTVqqKjOOiOveyY5FPJ3mWiczVQw0U3dNei-Z21a4NtSWnhWEI60vUAtHppDO_rmOeic5Ugyby44IrQDFfhv69M7vUQ3Luef1IKzsYFAlUYCbWKBelfwQU2JSmxhaMjljmOcp_2LPd0CZpVORnZ_3CorNztD_xfzkmMLE2DbXEGFQqc3AePpwqRrbtXQatwE1eyR-AbNtsUEZp0mrCs6e4Af0sFGF7M0Nh-Y_CMNtI6qb0PUpcWjLV/4lj/-LLh-oyFRhOr5KpAxUuNMg/h1/h001.RGnyc0PAZPpQ_EMntWTCjegJqI8v1HUDqQj1TFnkVQU)

clean_body: No matter what happens, we have each other’s backs. | | | Peter, We’ve been closely following updates in the Texas DACA case before Judge Hanen, and want to keep you in the loop. New briefs were filed on Monday, but the most important thing to know right now is that renewals are still open and DACA recipients remain protected — and are working to ensure recipients stay protected. Renewals continue to be processed for the whole country with FULL DACA benefits, including access to work permits, for all DACA recipients, including those in Texas. Meanwhile, it’s also critical to recognize that immigration agents are escalating their actions across the country. DACA recipients are being disappeared and thrown into detention without any form of due process, despite having current protections. No matter what happens, we have each other’s backs. United We Dream is here to provide clear information, support, and space to process what this latest update and the future of DACA mean for our communities. This remains true: DACA recipients, immigrant youth, and all immigrants must be able to live with dignity and safety.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thank you for taking action to help us support DACA recipients and immigrant youth. — Nico, United We Dream P.S. Check out our DACA explainer and help spread the word by sharing it on your social media. Find it here: , , , and . Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Some thoughts after Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1278%2E251025%2EEwXzXq ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1278%2E251025%2EEwXzXq ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

It’s been a little over a week since Election Day, and I’ve had some time
to reflect.

What we saw last week says a lot about where our movement is headed, and I
want to explain why. But first, I have to ask: [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251112-2-ak.AjjjWn&amount=10&refcode=em20251112-1273&t=1004&akid=1278%2E251025%2EEwXzXq ]Could you pitch in a few
bucks to keep this campaign going strong?

Keep reading, and I’ll explain why your support matters now more than
ever. Thank you. 🙏

Now, my thoughts:

1. The Democratic establishment is at an inflection point.

What we saw on Election Day made one thing crystal clear: The old playbook
is failing.

Candidates who spoke directly to the real, daily struggles of working
people — affordability, housing, healthcare — won by huge margins. That’s
a big contrast to last year, where the overarching message from the
establishment was “Stop Trump by voting blue.”

Voters don’t want leaders who only talk about fighting MAGA Republicans.
They want leaders who fight for them.

Now, the Democratic establishment has a choice to make — either embrace
this new generation of leaders who aren’t afraid to speak plainly about
the cost of living, corporate greed, and corruption, or double down on a
“vote blue no matter who” approach that keeps losing ground and leaves
voters unmotivated.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

2. Organizing and message still matter — a lot.

In every place that we saw campaigns reinvigorate hope in people, voter
turnout surged, breaking records in cities like New York.

When you talk about building an economy that actually works for working
people, folks don’t just listen. They show up. They donate. They
volunteer.

It’s proof that inspiration and organization beat cynicism and apathy
every single time.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

3. Voters don’t want politicians who are bought and paid for.

This one hits close to home.

Across the country, corporate-backed establishment candidates lost.
Candidates who ran people-powered campaigns, who refused to take a dime
from corporate PACs or AIPAC, prevailed.

Working people recognize that politicians who take money from the same
corporations and billionaires who benefit from the broken system can’t be
trusted to lead.

That’s why I’m proud to be the only candidate in this race who’s never
taken money from corporate PACs or AIPAC.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Now, you may be thinking, “So, what does this all mean for us?”

All of this means our campaign is on the right side of history, and that
we can win this — with a big caveat.

That caveat is money. If AIPAC and corporate PACs flood the airwaves with
ads attacking our campaign and boosting their preferred candidate, and we
don’t have the resources to respond, we could very well lose.

And they’re already spending money to defeat us. Every day we wait to
respond, we fall further behind, and once their narrative takes hold, it’s
nearly impossible to undo.

Peter, our
grassroots campaign doesn’t have AIPAC or corporate PACs writing
six-figure checks — we have you. If enough of us step up today, we can
still match their spending and win this race on our terms.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251112-2-ak.AjjjWn&amount=10&refcode=em20251112-1273&t=1005&akid=1278%2E251025%2EEwXzXq ]Please, make a donation right now. This email could be the difference
between winning a people-powered Senate seat or watching AIPAC and
corporate PACs buy it out from under us.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251112-2-ak.AjjjWn&amount=10&refcode=em20251112-1273&t=1024&akid=1278%2E251025%2EEwXzXq ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you for being part of this movement. What we saw last week gives me
more hope than ever, but only if we stick together.

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1025&akid=1278%2E251025%2EEwXzXq
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1026&akid=1278%2E251025%2EEwXzXq

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: We think you deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
We know we’ve reached out a lot lately to ask for your support. Thank you for bearing with us. And before we ask once again today, we think you deserve an explanation for what’s going on and why we’re asking for your support so often.
Here it is:
We’re asking for your help today because Jon Ossoff is MAGA’s #1 target in the midterm elections. Trump, the GOP, and an army of dark-money Super PACs are going to be doing everything they can over the next year to beat us and replace Jon in the Senate with a MAGA loyalist.
_And it is up to us to stop them, Peter._
It’s not going to be easy — they’ve already poured $10 MILLION into Georgia and there’s a good chance that by Election Day, this will be the biggest and most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
**The bottom line is that Jon cannot win this race by himself. Nobody can. It is going to take a massive, grassroots movement of people like you to get it done.**
So we are humbly asking:
[**Peter, can you please give $5 — or whatever feels right — to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today? Building the largest political campaign in Georgia history is not going to be easy, and we have to start right now.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251112-1-f-a&t=1&akid=1076%2E5691347%2EWIekFM)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/1686?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.Au35NX&refcode=em251112-1-f-a&t=20&akid=1076%2E5691347%2EWIekFM)**

clean_body: Peter, We know we’ve reached out a lot lately to ask for your support. Thank you for bearing with us. And before we ask once again today, we think you deserve an explanation for what’s going on and why we’re asking for your support so often. Here it is: We’re asking for your help today because Jon Ossoff is MAGA’s #1 target in the midterm elections. Trump, the GOP, and an army of dark-money Super PACs are going to be doing everything they can over the next year to beat us and replace Jon in the Senate with a MAGA loyalist. And it is up to us to stop them, Peter. It’s not going to be easy — they’ve already poured $10 MILLION into Georgia and there’s a good chance that by Election Day, this will be the biggest and most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. The bottom line is that Jon cannot win this race by himself. Nobody can. It is going to take a massive, grassroots movement of people like you to get it done. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Before you hit the hay…
body:
There’s something I need to tell you...

| | | | [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)Hey, Peter. It’s Marsha.
I know it’s late, and you’re probably getting settled for the night, but I need to tell you something that can’t wait until the morning.
I’m just **$231** short of today's fundraising goal. I know this doesn’t seem like a lot. But trust me when I say every single dollar counts when it comes to defeating the Democrats and protecting our GOP Majority.
If we fall short of our goal tonight, it will set the stage for a complete Democrat takeover. Every GOP victory in the past few weeks will be gone overnight!
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._E1qd6pu36ygFvA)[This is why failure is not an option here, Peter. I’m calling on every patriot reading this email to chip in $4. Nothing more. Nothing less. Just $4.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)[Chip In $4

name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: I just pleaded not guilty
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Kat For Illinois**
body:
My indictment just escalated
#
**Friend – today, I showed up in court for my arraignment and pleaded not guilty to the trumped-up, politically-motivated charges against me.**
In case you missed it: two weeks ago, five others and I were charged by Donald Trump and the federal government with two charges for exercising our First Amendment rights near ICE’s Broadview processing center. [**I'm asking for your support – will you fill out this form to stay in the loop as I stand up for our First Amendment rights? >>**](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22047?t=1&akid=1341%2E2118727%2EOBndnR)
ICE and Donald Trump know that their actions against me were violent, unprovoked, and not constitutionally defensible. They know they are wrong, they know that they are inhumane, and they know that history will not be on their side.
The indictment was scary, but showing up in court to face these baseless charges makes these attacks feel even more real.
**But I will keep standing up because ICE continues to harass our communities and detain our neighbors. We know this is wrong, and we need to use our constitutionally protected rights to stop it.**
**[Now more than ever, we need to stand against authoritarianism and speak out in favor of free speech. I won't stop fighting, but I need your help to mount this enormous legal fight. I'm hoping you'll join our large grassroots movement by signing up to be on my supporter list. This fight will take all of us working together>>](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22047?t=2&akid=1341%2E2118727%2EOBndnR)**
In solidarity, and take care,
Kat Abughazaleh
[](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22047?t=3&akid=1341%2E2118727%2EOBndnR)
**Paid For By Kat For Illinois**
---

name: Saikat
subject: Some thoughts from our first-ever town hall
body:
Monday's town hall demonstrated, once again, that San Francisco voters are fed up with leaders who will only do the right thing when it’s convenient

| | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=6f7c44e6d0&e=bf17056ae8)
| | | | | |
Friends,
This week, nearly 200 of our neighbors packed into a community hall in the Richmond for our first-ever neighborhood town hall.
---
[|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=2d77c2c5ae&e=bf17056ae8)
| | It was standing room only, even after we had to email people asking them not to come unless they lived in the neighborhood!
I left feeling more certain than ever that San Francisco — and our nation — is ready for change.
People are hungry for leaders who will stand up to authoritarianism and oligarchy, whether it’s MAGA Republicans or pro-corporate Democrats.
They want representatives who will defend the right to protest and speak out against the genocide in Gaza.
And they want a Democratic Party that leads with principle and imagination again.
That’s what this campaign is about. I’m not taking a dime of corporate or lobbyist money, so if I have the honor of representing this city, I’ll only be accountable to the people of San Francisco.
This was just the beginning. We’re taking this campaign to every neighborhood: next up are Bernal Heights, Potrero Hill, and Glen Park.
If you’re outside San Francisco, you can still help us make this possible. We need the resources to keep hosting these events and to get our message to voters in every corner of the city.
[**Can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today?**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=8620e0ff3e&e=bf17056ae8)

---
| [Chip in $5](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=813066f311&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| | | | | | We have the chance to lead the way in redefining the Democratic Party, and to prove that we can still lead with courage and creativity, not fear and calculation.
Together, we can build a Democratic Party as bold as the MAGA threat demands.
Gratefully,Saikat

---
| | | | |

---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/about?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&e=bf17056ae8&c=9c16c12355) [unsubscribe from this list](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&t=b&e=bf17056ae8&c=9c16c12355) [update subscription preferences](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&e=bf17056ae8&c=9c16c12355)
Saikat for Congress * 1388 Haight St PMB 1124 * San Francisco, CA 94117-2909 * USA

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I believe He saved me for a reason.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
This is why I think He did it.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e6160111/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRlpqSHp1bVI1dQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTExMTI/LbmNsNnY3dTlwdg/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbDZ1WjdlRjVSWHdscw/gaRUP5A/scla839471d)
| | | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e6160111/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtZmFpdGgtZmFtaWx5LWZyZWVkb20tdjMtc2Iv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTExMTI/LbmNsNnY3dTlwdg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE4NjNfZnRkMQ/gaRUP5A/s7j47d193cc)
---
**I was never supposed to be President.**

I was never supposed to survive the bullet of an assassin, **BUT I DID.**
I was never supposed to be President of the United States again, **BUT I AM.**
I was never supposed to Make America Great Again, **BUT I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
The great behemoth known as the Democrat Party threw everything at me: Hoaxes, Witch Hunts, Impeachments, Election Interference, Raids, Arrests, and so much more!
But the steady compass of Faith has guided my hands through it all.
NOW, the government is completely shut down, and they want **MAGA TO BE DONE.**
_We can’t take our foot off the gas!_
I was saved for this one reason: to Make America Great Again.
I was made for this, **BUT MAGA IS POWERED BY YOU.**
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.

clean_body: I’m laser-focused on this one thing. | Fellow American, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party's voter file isLAGGING behind the Democrats'. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer's Shutdown (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... ...But unless we have a 100% verified voter file, we'll lose everything to the Democrats, We need to MATCH that energy and determination. We can't let Democrats take back the reins of the Senate for the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency. GOP Rep. Nick Langworthy **[shut down Democrat Rep. Rosa DeLauro's self righteous monologue,](https://substack.com/redirect/b436805d-7956-4c13-a822-82142e02e6b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** hissing at Republicans for not paying SNAP benefits before the government is reopened.
"You won't vote to make that pain go away!" Langworthy told the furious Democrat. "It's hypocrisy at its very worst!!"
**[Watch the clash right here:](https://substack.com/redirect/b436805d-7956-4c13-a822-82142e02e6b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **Don 't Ignore the Signs...**

Dear Reader,

Over 92 million adults in the US are taking a statin - are you one of them? If so, **[you need to know about the silent deficiency that blood tests can't catch](https://substack.com/redirect/fce494b0-d310-4e04-82b5-010c9c521489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/fce494b0-d310-4e04-82b5-010c9c521489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Even if you're not taking a statin - and just want to keep your heart, blood pressure and cholesterol in check - please take a moment to learn how statins can lead to a critical deficiency:
**[⇒ 5 signs you're at risk from this deficiency (important info for statin users)](https://substack.com/redirect/fce494b0-d310-4e04-82b5-010c9c521489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

**P.S.** If you or someone you love has ever taken a statin, **[this could be the most important article you read this week](https://substack.com/redirect/fce494b0-d310-4e04-82b5-010c9c521489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/fce494b0-d310-4e04-82b5-010c9c521489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **White House rebukes Epstein emails released by Democrats**
The Trump White House **[countered House Democrats' release of three Jeffrey Epstein emails](https://substack.com/redirect/c53df8c5-8816-4b5d-a5c7-40d1ebb981ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wednesday by revealing that the unnamed victim Epstein referenced as having "spent hours" with Trump was the late Virginia Giuffre, who previously said Trump "couldn't have been friendlier" and was never involved in any wrongdoing, with press secretary Karoline Leavitt calling the release "a fake narrative to smear President Trump."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c53df8c5-8816-4b5d-a5c7-40d1ebb981ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Epstein emails show Trump stopped Maxwell from recruiting at Mar-a-Lago:** In a January 2019 email to author Michael Wolff, Epstein admitted Trump "knew about the girls as he asked Ghislaine to stop" recruiting young women from Mar-a-Lago's spa, while an April 2011 email described Trump as "that dog that hasn't barked" who had never been mentioned by the victim despite her spending hours at Epstein's house with him.
* **Trump kicked Epstein out for recruiting staff:** President Trump explained in July that he banned Epstein from Mar-a-Lago after the financier repeatedly "stole people that worked for me" from the spa, saying "when I heard about it, I told him, 'we don't want you taking our people,' and then not too long after that, he did it again. And I said, 'Out of here,'" while the Justice Department concluded over the summer that Epstein committed suicide and didn't keep a "client list."

* * *
# **China agrees to ban fentanyl precursor chemicals following FBI visit**
China agreed to ban all 13 precursor chemicals and control seven subsidiaries used to **[manufacture fentanyl](https://substack.com/redirect/67dd5489-8763-4708-a858-b73dede04748?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** following a visit by FBI Director Kash Patel, who announced the breakthrough Wednesday at a White House press briefing.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e5b33543-7279-491d-acde-2cb3ffd54c83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Agreement details** : The Chinese government will designate the substances as banned, cutting off the pipeline that Mexican drug trafficking organizations use to produce the lethal drug blamed for tens of thousands of American deaths annually. "Essentially, President Trump has shut off the pipeline that creates fentanyl that kills tens of thousands of Americans," Patel told reporters. "These substances are now banned, and they will no longer be utilized by the Mexican drug trafficking organizations."
* **Trump credited** : Patel attributed the agreement to President Donald Trump's recent meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping, stating "this was only possible due to President Trump's historic engagement with President Xi just a few short weeks ago that set the stage for today's announcement." Trump imposed 10% tariffs on Beijing earlier in his term, accusing China of failing to curb chemical flows, prompting retaliatory Chinese tariffs.
* **Scale of crisis** : The FBI has seized 1,900 kilograms of fentanyl this year -- enough to kill 127 million Americans, according to Patel. The United States listed China as a major illicit drug producer in 2023, with Trump alleging Beijing enabled fentanyl production by subsidizing precursor chemical exports and failing to prevent Chinese companies from selling to criminal cartels.

* * *
# **Flight disruptions set to continue despite impending end of shutdown**
Officials warn the effects of the government shutdown will extend for weeks even after lawmakers reopen the government, with **[flight disruptions likely continuing](https://substack.com/redirect/07d04076-df2c-4464-94f7-d543158c8483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** into the busy holiday season as the industry struggles to rebuild schedules and restore staffing levels.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07d04076-df2c-4464-94f7-d543158c8483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive disruptions** : Between Sunday and 1:30 p.m. ET Wednesday, over 26,000 flights across the U.S. were delayed and another 7,500 were canceled, according to FlightAware data. Major hubs including Chicago O'Hare, Newark Liberty in New Jersey and Atlanta's Hartsfield-Jackson.
* **Airline breakdown** : Among the four major carriers analyzed, Southwest logged the most flight delays nationwide this week with just over 9,000, while Delta recorded the highest number of cancellations at more than 1,300 flights.
* **Staffing crisis** : The Federal Aviation Administration was already facing a shortage of about 3,000 air traffic controllers before the shutdown began. Approximately 13,000 controllers and 50,000 TSA agents have been working without pay during the 42-day closure.

clean_body: Every GOP voter should verify their profile ASAP Dear Peter, I am reaching out with a critical request. For decades, the radical left has allowed open borders that flooded their states with illegal immigrants. Now, they want to turn them into voters - but not on our watch. This is a long process. We need 100% participation to secure our strategy ahead of 2026. It'll take you less than 3 minutes - but it could save our House Majority. you & God bless. Sincerely, Speaker Mike Johnson| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Carol Obando-Derstine
subject: Did you know there are more millionaires than moms in Congress?
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119165148/582159676/1263844317?refcode=WUEFHK30_20251112_CODSplit_ALL&sourceid=1057329&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM1OGQ0Zi0xYmMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDVP0TFCFlAY6-hnpaJIyGjccUmf_phdDMW4sZOd5Ic=) Peter,

Did you know there are more millionaires than moms in Congress?

That says a lot about who has a voice at the table and who doesn't.

I'm running for Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District because Washington doesn't need another political insider or millionaire representing real, hardworking families. It needs a mom who knows what it's like to struggle to make ends meet, to care for a family, and to fight for better opportunities for our kids.

**In this race, I'm the only woman, the only person of color, the only Latina,_and the only mom_.**

When the people making decisions don't look like the communities they serve, families get left behind. [**This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you believe Congress needs fewer millionaires and more moms fighting for working families, will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119165149/582159677/1263844317?refcode=WUEFHK30_20251112_CODSplit_ALL&sourceid=1057329&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM1OGQ0Zi0xYmMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDVP0TFCFlAY6-hnpaJIyGjccUmf_phdDMW4sZOd5Ic=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119165150/582159678/1263844317?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFHK30_20251112_CODSplit_ALL&sourceid=1057329&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM1OGQ0Zi0xYmMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDVP0TFCFlAY6-hnpaJIyGjccUmf_phdDMW4sZOd5Ic=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119165152/582159679/1263844317?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFHK30_20251112_CODSplit_ALL&sourceid=1057329&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM1OGQ0Zi0xYmMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDVP0TFCFlAY6-hnpaJIyGjccUmf_phdDMW4sZOd5Ic=)

name: Team MGP
subject: Tackling corporate greed in emergency services
body:
| | Peter – Across Southwest Washington, first responders are sounding the alarm: the price of a single fire truck has quadrupled in just a few decades, and delivery can take years.

That means small towns and rural communities are being priced out of the equipment we need to keep people safe. It’s not only a budget problem, Peter, but **it’s also a public safety issue.**

Marie heard those concerns loud and clear. That’s why she passed a bipartisan amendment to require the Federal Trade Commission to study consolidation in the fire truck and emergency vehicle industry, and publicly report on how it’s driving up costs and slowing deliveries.

When a handful of companies control most of the market, they limit competition, raise prices, and leave taxpayers and emergency responders footing the bill. Communities like ours deserve transparency and accountability so we can plan, budget, and respond to emergencies.

[If you agree that every community deserves affordable access to emergency services, add your name to support Marie’s work today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119166399/582163907/1283181992?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251112_1_1&refcode2=9ab0db98-21c0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWIwZGI5OC0yMWMwLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fX8twsRR6NJTXizanLCpWbVW3er5NongpTgOagoYI8=&emci=ad08bdeb-1ac0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9ab0db98-21c0-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31138575)

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Friend, this is disgusting. Men and women who put their lives on the line to protect our communities deserve better. Here at LELDF we are fighting to defend our police officers who’ve devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving U.S. citizens like you and me. At a time when the attacks against the police are at their worst – [I hope you’ll stand with our men and women in blue by supporting LELDF today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Thank you for choosing to protect law and order. Please pray for our officers.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---

The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_ [**Join our sustaining members by making a monthly gift to LELDF today!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

name: Feedback Requested! via Fight For Reform
subject: It's about Vote-By-Mail in your area...

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23606%2E4449941%2EDXuTRA) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23606%2E4449941%2EDXuTRA) Team – over 45 MILLION Americans voted by mail in the 2024 Presidential Election.

**[But as you may know, National Republicans are attacking Vote-by-Mail with dangerous Voter Suppression bills._And just recently, the Supreme Court agreed to hear a GOP lawsuit that could radically restrict voting by mail._ If these anti-Vote-by-Mail bills pass, voters won’t have their voices heard.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69950?t=3&akid=23606%2E4449941%2EDXuTRA)

So, we need to better understand what local Democrats think of vote‐by‐mail.
[**Will you answer our emergency poll right away?**
](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69950?t=4&akid=23606%2E4449941%2EDXuTRA) [ **URGENT POLL via Fight For Reform** [ **Do you support giving every American the option to vote-by-mail in 2026? **
